reviews.text: Pleasant experience!
Warren did an excellent job handling our case. He was very professional, thorough, and was able to get us an amazing result. Highly recommend.

Mr. Abel took my moms case last year, and I have nothing bad to say, since the moment we spoke the first time it’s been nothing but being straight forward and being direct about the case. He start to move quickly with the case and was abel to reach a settlement. We thank him for everything and would highly recommend him and his firm to everyone!

I had a car accident over a year ago and the lawyer prior to Mr. Abel did nothing. I was having to say on top of him to inform me of everything. Finally I reached out to Mr. Abel and he handled everything without question, without me having to stay on top of it myself and quickly settled my claim with a better outcome than I expected. I would 100% recommend him to my friends and family.

From the first day that I spoke with attorney Warren, I knew that everything would work out. Warren was an outstanding communicator and explained everything in easy to understand terms. He wasn’t afraid to take my case to court to get the best result. He was amazing in the courtroom and we ended up getting the best result. I would recommend Warren to anyone.

After my accident with an 18 wheeler, I wasn't sure where to turn since I had never dealt with anything like this before. Tyler Bridgers took the anxiety and weight off my shoulders immediately. I sent in a consultation and was contacted the next day. He understood the specific laws surrounding commercial trucking accidents and how to deal with insurance companies. He even got my police report for me and helped me with anything else I needed step by step. He fought hard to get me a great settlement and kept me informed throughout the process. I highly recommend Tyler and his team. There's no one else I would ever trust with any legal issues.

I had the pleasure of having Tyler Bridgers as my attorney for my case. He was always very helpful and very responsive to when I had questions or concerns. It was a very smooth and easy process. I would definitely recommend this firm to anybody who has had them misfortunate of being in an accident or is going through a difficult legal issue.

Having to go through a legal battle over a car accident that was not my fault while dealing with injuries was not ideal, but Tyler took care of everything and got me a great settlement. He was very professional, knowledgeable, kind, fair and easy to work with. He always explained the process and answered all of my questions. It was easy to get in touch with him and he responded quickly. If you find yourself in need of an attorney, I highly recommend that you contact Tyler Brigers.
Chris was knowledgeable, professional and easy to work with. While the entity we were suing initially made things difficult, Chris remained steadfast and we were finally able to settle.

Tyler H. Bridgers exudes an exceptional level of professionalism and knowledge of the law. Tyler answered my questions with great clarity, patience, and understanding. Communication was always timely. I am so very grateful to Mr. Bridgers for the outstanding results he achieved on my behalf.

At this time, Chris is the ONLY attorney I would want to talk to if I were injured in a car accident, and I know many attorneys! Chris is kind, professional, exceedingly intelligent, and he has your best interest at heart, even if it doesn't benefit him! Extremely great customer service, and he communicates in an easy-to-be-understood way with wisdom and compassion. Even though it ended up making more sense for me in my personal injury car accident claim to forego an attorney, Chris took time and lead and guided me every step of the way, all the way to me getting my settlement and him getting 0. Chris is an honest family man, He is The Father of the YEAR! Best believe, if I ever start to go after lawsuits and settlements, Christopher Simon is the FIRST number I would call...on speed dial! I would HATE to be the opposing party versus Chris...ever heard of Sun Tszu's "The Art of War" book? Well, Chris is a warrior, and fights with the tenacity of an undefeated worldclass champion WARRIOR...the fight of an underDAWG and the heart of a righteous LION! Chris, thank you so very much, I am eternally grateful for your time and help. All the best. Peace.

Couldn't have asked for an easier experience. From the first email on a Friday night, where I setup a call Saturday morning with Chris himself, not just a paralegal, it was a breeze. Chris was always upfront about everything regarding the details of my inquiry, and the chances to recover anything and from his experience how things would go. Extremely happy with the result.

Shortly after my car accident, we wanted to hire a lawyer to help us navigate dealing with the insurance companies.  Our biggest concern was finding a lawyer that would act in our best interest.  We chose the Simon Law Firm.

During our first conversation with Mr. Chris Simon, we knew we had found the right attorney.  He explained the entire legal process of our case in a way that was very easy to follow.  What we valued most in that first conversation was his realistic assessment of how the settlement process worked and what we could do to maximize our settlement value.

We highly encourage everyone to read Chris’s bio.  He is extremely knowledgeable about medicare, car insurance, and the big business insurance industry in general.  Chris shares his vast experience in his insurance book that we highly recommend you read.  We read it and it helped us tremendously.

In the months that followed, Chris and his team took care of all the legal work while we focused on recovering from the accident.  To not have to worry about all the legal ins and outs was a blessing during this difficult time.  We really appreciated the special little things that Chris and his team did throughout our time together.  Whether it was the Welcome Gift Basket or the Birthday Gift Card, we always felt like we were people to them and not just dollar signs.

We were very impressed with the close communication network that the practice displayed.  It was a very seamless process communicating with Chris and his team.  No matter who we talked to, it was as if the entire firm acted as one.  They all knew about our case and they were able to instantly answer any questions we had.  Alex was especially fantastic to work with !!  We really appreciated him accommodating us when we were unable to come to the office to complete the closing paperwork.

When it was all said and done, Chris used his special skills to get us more money than we anticipated !!  Even though it wasn’t a million dollar settlement, we felt like we got a million dollar defense !!

If you are looking to hire a personal injury attorney that is going to give it to you straight, fight for you, and maximize your settlement, it is our belief that you will not find a more trustworthy and ethical practice than the Simon Law Firm !!

I would highly recommend Simon Bridgers Spires. Tyler,  from the very start was always on top of things. He is a great and knowledgeable attorney. From the beginning of my case to the conclusion, I could not have ask for better representation! Thanks again Tyler!

Tyler Bridgers at Simon Bridgers Spires Attorneys at Law helped me and my family with a wrongful death claim of a family member. He was able to explain the process at each step and answered all of our questions. He was alway very responsive to our emails and calls. He kept us up to date as the claim progressed. He didn’t pass me off to an assistant. We worked directly with Tyler at every interaction. He is very professional and knowledgeable and I am confident that Tyler handled  our claim the best way possible. I would highly recommend him and his firm to anyone needing legal counsel with a personal injury or wrongful death case.

I'll start by saying that I was recommended to Tyler Bridgers and this firm from another client of theirs.  Lets just say that I am extremely grateful for the recommendation and that I contacted Tyler.

From the start of the case, Tyler was a professional that listened and understood my case from a loved ones perspective.  He guided me through the entire process and kept me updated and informed and answered all questions in their entirety to make sure I understood every step.

Ultimately, the case settled due to Tyler's knowledge of the law and how to apply it to my case and I am beyond thrilled with the results.

Thank you Tyler Bridgers for your hard work and persistence seeing this through to the end!  I recommend this firm and Tyler to anyone needing assistance in the field of law that the firm specializes in.

Do youself a favor and call Tyler!!!

Thanks again!!!

I recently was sent to Tyler Bridgers by other law firms that did not do very much with my case. Tyler picked it up, with little time remaining to pursue anything and ran with it. Immediately making it a priority to submit paperwork before deadlines passed. Tyler worked my case all the way through and did everything in his power to get me a little something back from my motorcycle accident. The process was over a year, but I was incredibly pleased with his abilities to manage the case, consistent updates on case progress / status and his patience at explaining exactly what my choices were when needing to decide avenues to move forward. I would recommend him tenfold for anyone looking for an exceptional lawyer. I cannot be more grateful for all his efforts and time he devoted to my case. Thank you, Tyler!

reviews.text: Attorney Christopher Simon is a very experienced honest hard working attorney  who will get results for you. when you need  someone to get the job done right call Chris he and his staff are awesome

Long story short my son was killed in a accident March 19, 2017. The young lady's policy was minimal but he was able to get the $25,000; also he was able to get and additional $50,000 from the uninsured motorist claim from my dad's policy. After it was all said and done I had enough to get a stable place to live for the 2 children I have left, pay off some bills, get a car with no payment that works! And make sure I can do the burial care for my my oldest son. People have said they know people who are still alive that have gotten more money than that. To be honest I'm happy that I still have two left to take care of and even if the money has already been spent, I have a lifetime of memories that I can make and cherish with my kids. I will continue to be optimistic and believe that there's more blessings to come; until then I'll continue to work hard, live life, love and forgive. Mr. Chris Simon and his staff are family to me. I know people often say that, but truly if it was just excellent customer service I would say that, but they are truly family to me.  I am forever grateful for each and every person that took the time out to listen when I was worried about things going the right way, or even just texted me to tell me that it's going to be okay, breathe, and even it's okay to cry. They're truly more than family. I genuinely love them and I pray continual blessings to them and their families.

Fantastic guy that helped me navigate through all the steps and process of adoption.

I cannot say enough good things about Michael Brown. From the very beginning, he was professional, knowledgeable, and truly had my back through one of the most stressful situations a mother can go through; a custody case involving my child’s father who made everything unnecessarily difficult.

My very first interaction with Mike is something I will never forget. I called him panicking because I was terrified I was being served, and I left him a voicemail crying. Later, I found out he and his wife heard that voicemail while they were sitting at the dinner table, and at 8:30 at night, he still took the time to call me back and reassure me that I was going to be okay. He told me he would take care of me  and he absolutely meant it.

From that moment forward, Mike handled everything with confidence, strategy, and calm professionalism. He kept me informed every step of the way, explained everything clearly, and made sure I always felt prepared and protected. I never felt like “just another case.” He genuinely cared about the outcome for my daughter and our future.

After custody, Mike also helped with my husband adopting my daughter, and the entire process was seamless. He made what could have been overwhelming feel easy and stress-free. Everything was handled efficiently, correctly, and with care.

Honestly, my husband and I joke that if we ever had a prenup, it would say I get to keep Mike  and he has to find a different lawyer, because he’s not getting him, that’s how much we trust and value Mike.

He said he would take care of me, and he did, all the way until the very end.

If you need a family law attorney who is sharp, reliable, and will fight for what matters most, Michael Brown is the one. I recommend him to everyone I know  and honestly, hiring anyone else besides Mike would be foolish.

10/10 recommend
Certainly doesn’t not recommend. Severe lack of communication & responsiveness.

Michael really cares. Where all other attorneys would turn a nose because you didnt have enough assets or a lot of money, michael looks at your situation and makes it work for you! He took on my case that should have been "easy" and fought some hard battles for me. He stayed on the phone with me in times that I was scared for my safety to ensure I made it out. He listens. Divorce is hard enough but to have someone help guide you is a blessing. If I could rate more than 5 stars I would! Michael Brown is the real deal and I couldnt be more thankful for all he has done for me!

Five stars simply aren’t enough to rate the incredible work of attorney Michael Brown. He is not only a highly skilled and knowledgeable professional but also a genuinely wonderful person who brings a sense of security and unwavering support to his clients.

Going through a divorce is never easy—it’s an emotionally challenging and complex process. However, with Michael’s guidance and expertise, everything became much more manageable. His dedication, compassion, and charismatic personality made a world of difference during such a difficult time.

To anyone seeking legal help, I can confidently say you couldn’t be in better hands. Michael truly cares about his clients’ well-being, and his commitment to their success is unmatched. I am endlessly grateful for his support and exceptional work. Thank you, Michael, for everything!

This is the second time Michael has represented me in a child custody case. Everything went smoothly and in my favor. His knowledge in this field is amazing! He’s honest, caring and really fights for you. He pays attention to detail, and takes the time to listen and is there whenever you need anything. If I ever needed a lawyer again I would have him every-time. I recommend Mike to everyone and appreciate everything he did for me!

My recent divorce was handled quickly, efficiently and without complications by Michael Brown.  Divorce is always a stressful time, however I couldn’t have asked for a smoother transition.  Michael’s knowledge and expertise in his field was exceptional. His response to all my phone calls and texts were met immediately!!  I would highly recommend him to anyone needing a great attorney for divorce or civil needs.

Michael has been such a blessing throughout this whole process, and I can't say enough great things about him. I met with several other attorneys before finding Michael, but immediately knew during our initial consultation that I wanted him to represent me for my case. I came into this not knowing anything about child custody law, and being completely terrified about what the outcome might be. Michael was calm and confident from the very start, and remained that way throughout the duration of my case. He was always honest with me even if it was something I didn't want to hear. He fought so hard to get me the things I wanted, and never made me feel stupid or crazy for feeling the way I did on certain aspects of my case. He often reminded me how I deserved to be treated from the opposing party and reassured me that everything was going to be okay, which was exactly what I needed. I always felt that he made time for me even when I knew he was busy with other cases, which is something that is hard to find with attorneys. Michael is such a kind and genuine person who really cares for his clients. I would 10/10 recommend him to anyone who is facing a child custody case. He knows the law so well. You would really be missing out on a great attorney if you don't have him by your side.

Mr Brown helped in a custody case with my son/gf and her child. Mr Brown helped resolve the issue and showed us that patience and time and a good Attny can help resolve any issue. His help was much appreciated and our case technically won. I can’t thank his office enough for the help. Tina Buckler

Mike has seriously changed our entire families life and we will forever be grateful for him. He is our life long attorney from here on out and comes highly recommended! Thanks again for all your help!

reviews.text:
I am writing this letter to express my utmost satisfaction and gratitude for the exceptional legal representation provided by you during my divorce proceedings. I would like to offer my highest recommendation for your services as a divorce attorney.
From the moment I engaged your services, I was impressed by your professionalism, expertise, and dedication to my case. Your extensive knowledge of family law and your ability to navigate complex legal issues were evident throughout the entire process. You consistently demonstrated a deep understanding of the intricacies of divorce law and provided me with sound advice and guidance at every step.
Your communication skills were exemplary, and you always made yourself available to address my concerns and answer my questions promptly. Your ability to explain legal concepts in a clear and concise manner helped me understand the complexities of my case and make informed decisions.
I was particularly impressed by your strategic approach to my case. You carefully analyzed the details, considered all possible outcomes, and developed a comprehensive strategy that aligned with my goals. Your negotiation skills were outstanding, and you were able to secure a favorable settlement that exceeded my expectations.
Throughout the entire process, you exhibited empathy, compassion, and a genuine concern for my well-being. Divorce can be an emotionally challenging experience, but your support and reassurance helped alleviate much of the stress and anxiety associated with it.
I would also like to commend your professionalism and integrity. You consistently demonstrated the highest ethical standards, and I always felt that my best interests were your top priority. Your attention to detail, thoroughness, and commitment to achieving the best possible outcome for me were truly commendable.
In conclusion, I cannot thank you enough for your exceptional legal representation during my divorce. Your expertise, professionalism, and dedication were instrumental in achieving a successful resolution to my case. I wholeheartedly recommend you to anyone in need of a skilled and compassionate divorce attorney.

My initial contact with Mr. Rothman was over the phone and I went through a very detailed background consultation questionnaire connected to the my case. He was calm, friendly, very knowledgeable and professional over the phone. At the courthouse he was exactly the same in person. While I was sitting on a seat at the rear of the court waiting for my case to be called, I was watching Mr. Rothman who was at the front of the court near the Judge and administration staff.

He carried himself as a very smooth professional who has done this a million times before. He took me outside the courtroom to a seated area to give me guidance on how to answer the judge's questions and gave me important information concerning my case such as probation, cost, etc.

Long story short I would definitely recommend his services to anyone who has a DUI case especially a first-time offender like me. My charge was lowered to a lesser charge thanks to Mr. Rothman, and I am grateful. Lastly money for me is tight and I do have to give a thank you to the company paralegal (Keilah). During the course of the case, I had many interactions with her both over the phone and via email. She always would get answers to the questions that I asked her.

Jeff Rothman has handled DUI, possession of marijuana, and underage possession of alcohol cases for many clients that I have referred to him. He does a great job for them. He knows the law and he knows the Athens-Clarke Court court system very well.  If you, or your college aged child, are facing charges in Athens, call Jeff Rothman.

Attorney Rothman has extensive knowledge of DUI law and clearly understands how to advise and represent his clients. He is truly one of the best. reviews.ownerResponse:
The Firm was retained to assist Ms. Gaines in obtaining guardianship of an adult. The proper petition for guardianship was prepared and filed in the proper court based upon the information provided by Ms. Gaines. When official service of the required documents was attempted it was learned that the adult over whom Ms. Gaines sought guardianship no longer resided at the addresses provided by Ms. Gaines. The new address of the adult over whom guardianship was sought was not found after a search by the Firm and Ms. Gaines. Ms. Gaines did eventually report a new address for the adult to the Firm. As the new address was in a different county new paperwork was prepared and delivered to the appropriate court official. At that time the Firm was informed the adult's sister had recently been granted guardianship. Ms. Gaines was advised a guardianship of the adult had been issued and was advised on the Firm's recommendation concerning removing and replacing the appointed guardian. Ms. Gaines disagreed with the Firm's recommendation and stated that she intended to go to the court herself. The Firm took her on her word for her intentions. Based upon Ms. Gaines's disagreement with the Firm's recommendation and her stated intention to go to the court herself, the Firm believed Ms. Gaines no longer wished to be represented by the Firm (which was her right). The Firm performed no additional legal work. Ms. Gaines later complained that the Firm was not performing work for her and Ms. Gaines had to be reminded that she was the one who did not like the Firm's recommendation and said she was going to go to the Court herself.

Any lawyer can only assist a client based upon the facts of a situation. When new information is discovered or when the facts change, legal advice must also account for these new facts. In representing Ms. Gaines the Firm considered the facts presented by Ms. Gaines in making a recommendation but when the facts changed or when new facts were discovered, the Firm's recommendation also had to change. Ms. Gaines disagreed with the Firm's revised recommendations. While it is frustrating to have to adjust to new facts, failing to adjust will make it that much harder to succeed. The Firm's recommendation was the Firm's best opinion on how Ms. Gaines could achieve her desired outcome but Ms. Gaines cannot be forced to follow the Firm's recommendation and she elected to pursue other options.

I was charged with a DUI in April 2012. The following month I met with Mr. Lee Webb for a consultation after already meeting and speaking with a few lawyers. Prior to meeting with Lee Webb I read up on him and the law offices of Head, Thomas, Webb, and Willis, and it was very clear that it was a top notch firm, but any person knows that just because something looks good on paper doesn't mean it truly is all that it says to be. So I set up a consultation, and keep in mind I already was 95% sure on another lawyer, but within 5 minutes I changed my mind and knew Lee Webb was the man I needed if I wanted to get the case dismissed because just by the way he presented himself and spoke I knew he's the type of guy you want on your side. After hiring Mr. Webb I had my first court appearance, and there were hundreds of people there, and it could of taken all day but as soon as Mr. Webb appeared in that court room he was allowed to go in the back room to speak with the prosecutor and whoever else they needed to speak with, as were other lawyers, but I don't know if they had their clients out of there within the first 10 minutes. That alone made me feel even more confident in Mr. Webb. He told me what the possible options may be (both good and bad) and I went about my life and was back at work. About 4-6 weeks passed and I get a call from Mr. Webb while I'm at work and he tells me he got my case DISMISSED within a month or two of when I was charged!!! It was the greatest feeling. After the long nights considering what may happen if I get convicted, the probation, the conviction on my record,etc., all of those possibilities were wiped away, and in the end all I had to do was pay for a traffic citation for $60, and that was the happiest I will ever be to pay for a ticket!

Unfortunately 2 years passed and I find myself being pulled over late at night and next thing I know I'm a jail cell and charged with DUI AGAIN. When I was bailed out I knew exactly where to go and went right back to Lee Webb. This time it was a lot more shaky knowing that law enforcement, the prosecutor, and a judge would all be able to see that I was charged with a DUI before because you do not have to be convicted for them to see you've had a similar situation before. So it made everything that more scary. I never had to appear in court, and Lee told me he was going to have this one sent downtown to Fulton County, which is his specialty. Fulton County deals with a lot of cases and this allows your case to be pushed back, and back, and back some more. So a year passes and I still haven't even been to court. It got to the point that I didn't even think about the case, so I could work and live my life without it interfering in any way all because of Lee Webb. All I had to do was stay out of trouble...fast forward one more year and out of the blue I see a missed call from Mr. Webb and my heart drops. I call him back and Lee answers because he is great with his phone and always makes himself available to his clients. He tells me for the second time himself, not his secretary, but Lee Webb himself tells me the great news that my case was dismissed AGAIN!! It was even more relieving than the first time because even though it didn't interfere with my life it was still attached to my life and it made me feel like something was weighing me down. Who knows what would of happened if I never decided to meet with Mr. Lee Webb but it was the best decision of my life after being put in the worst situation of my life. Also the accountants, assistants/secretaries at Thomas, Webb, and Willis/Law Offices of J. Lee Webb were great. They were very professional and prompt to reply to any questions or concerns I had. Together they make an amazing team. If you ever find yourself in a tough situation ask for a consultation with Lee Webb. He's allowed me to live my life without anything holding me down, and for that I am forever thankful.

reviews.text:
Short version: Hire Jim Jenkins. He challenges bullies and wins.

Long version:

After downsizing, we moved into an apartment while looking for a home in Atlanta. We stored 40 years of family memorabilia and a few heirloom pieces of furniture in a popular, nationally-known, storage facility. We thought a short time in an indoor, climate-controlled, 4-story building would provide ample protection. Three years later we went to collect our treasures. As we lifted the door to our storage unit, we saw a 5-gallon bucket perched under the ceiling of our top floor 10x10. When we spoke to the manager about it, she said, “Oh, that. We had a small roof leak, but it was repaired several times. I hope there’s no damage.” There was damage - $12,000 worth of delaminated, mold-ridden water damage on the furniture. Worse than that, 40 years of family photos, our children’s awards, journals, music, treasured art creations, and my husband’s love letters were fused together into a brown, hardened mass. Water stains etched the concrete floor where the puddles had lingered. The manager apologized profusely, saying it was her fault. I asked why she didn’t contact us after discovering the first leak - maybe we could have saved something. She had no answer. The district manager apologized, too, claiming this was a rare occurrence in their company. Their multi-billion dollar company. We requested a refund of our rent. They denied it and offered us free, new boxes to repack instead. Repack what? Most everything was destroyed. I spent the next several months peeling apart photographs, but nothing could be saved. For months and months I left messages with the regional manager and national customer service center requesting a mere rental refund for their failed service; but their initial empathy had dissolved. They claimed there was nothing they could do.

Too weary to confront this Goliath in small claims court, I called Jim Jenkins upon a friend’s recommendation. After listening sincerely to my sad saga, he crafted a well-worded letter demanding a full refund of our rent and sent it to the decision-making players. He handled the unkind volleys that ensued; and, finally, they surrendered. We received the check for our rent just weeks ago.

This money won’t replace what we lost, but at least we didn’t “pay” this awful company to destroy our memories. I know this behemoth would never have refunded our money without Jim’s intervention. His kind counsel, proven expertise and sincere empathy helped us heal from this painful loss. Ultimately, it was all just stuff, but it was special stuff. Jim took some of the sting out of losing it. We will definitely call him for all of our future legal needs. You should, too.

reviews.text: Attorney Utley helped me through a personal injury case that involved with the added complication of me living in Florida and the accident occurred in Georgia. He was super fair with his pricing and he really made me feel he cared about my case on a personal level.  He was truly professional and a great litigator.  If we lived close, my husband and I wouldn’t go to another attorney for anything.  I recommend his services and his staff was always pleasant to speak with and very helpful as well.

The beginning is where I will start with this law firm, I was referred by a coworker of mine at the time when I was working at Best Buy of 2018. I was involved in a hit and run accident on May 18, 2018, and needed assistance, direction and guidance in the process because this was my first accident. Someone hit my car and drove off while I was driving for Uber and I had a passenger in my back seat at the time, although no one was hurt from what I had observed, it still was a scary situation to be in. All I can say is after being referred to this Law Firm, I called the number and spoke with his paralegal Mrs. Andretta, after explaining my situation she set up an appointment for me to meet up with Mr. Jim Jenkins at the Jenkins/Utley Law Office in Buckhead, GA. After arriving at the Law Office I was a bit nervous but felt at ease and right at home because I was greeted by Mrs. Andretta who was and still is a gracious woman. I met with Mr. Jenkins to explain the incident that I was involved in and he agreed to take my case. Although it has been almost a year to the settlement of my case, in which it had NOTHING to do with the Law Firm, it was just the nature of the beast and being that my situation was unique and other 3rd parties involved more so was the cause of the delay. Mr. Jenkins and his Law Firm were very detailed with their process and available at any time I needed clarification or guidance with my case. They walked me through the process and were a great team to work with in solving my case. I was prepared in the beginning for a long process of completion because my coworker that informed me disclosed to me that my case could take up to 6 months like his case did and possibly a year. Mr. Jenkins was up front and honest which is something that I can respect. In my honest opinion it didn't matter if I had to wait longer because of how him and his Law Firm were so patient and genuine in the process. This Law Firms main concern is YOU and getting the best possible situation that suits your needs for your case. They will fight your case tooth and nail leaving no stones unturned, as long as you are COMPLETELY HONEST with them about your situation, then there is NO REASON you should walk away being unfulfilled because they are open and willing to help, but you have to do your part as a human being and be upfront. All in all I would recommend this Law Firm 1,000 plus times to anyone who is in need of assistance with their personal injury case. I am just an honest, genuine, realistic person that seeks the same in others and was given that at this Law Firm. If you stumble upon this Law Firm from a Google Search, referral, etc., don't think twice about calling because you have come to the right Law Firm if you want your case to be resolved, it's up to you if your able to stay long enough for the conclusion and The RIGHT resolution for your case.

reviews.text:
Brad was recommended to me by a family friend during a time when I was very hurt and in a vulnerable situation. Initially, I didn’t want to talk much because I was experiencing a lot of pain, but Brad was willing to communicate with me via text, and I really appreciated that. During the course of our initial messaging, Brad’s biggest concern was getting me the medical help I needed, which stood out to me the most. He recommended me to a great medical team that helped me begin treatment for my injuries with me within a few days.
I had many questions and concerns throughout this entire process, in which Brad was able to not only answer them with transparency but he also provided me with reassurance and confidence throughout the process. I can remember multiple times where I called or sent Brad a message outside of his office hours, and he still got back to me very fast. There was even a time he was in New York and got an update via email on my case, and he immediately reached out to me.
There was never a moment where I felt like he was unreachable. He texted and called me to check on my recovery. His attention to detail played a big role in the outcome of my case. The passion he has for helping his clients took away any worries of the unknown that I had when it came to my case. 10/10 would recommend to anyone looking for someone that genuinely cares and that is willing to work tirelessly for your best interest.
reviews.ownerResponse: Devin, I greatly appreciate your 5-star review and all of the detailed feedback. We are all extremely proud of the result of your case. But I am just as proud to hear that we met--and exceeded--your expectations regarding our care for you during your medical treatment. We pride ourselves on excellent communication and results, and we were able to deliver on your case. Do not hesitate to reach out if we can ever help you again in any way. We wish you the best of luck!

reviews.text: After recently sustaining an injury, I contacted Brad for advice on whether I had a case with another entity.  He asked lots of questions and really dug deep into what I initially thought was a simple accident.  I never felt pressured or lead to answer in any specific way and he definitely made sure my memory of what happened was fully explained.  After going over the facts, he determined that certain aspects of what happened would cause me to ultimately lose the case despite the severity of my injury.  I know he was doing his best to find a way to help me but he honestly felt the facts didn’t substantiate me pursuing a case.  I would call him in the future without reservation as he educates as he analyzes the details of your particular experience.  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.text: Mr. Krasle advertises as being a divorce attorney. I found him to be substandard in this area of law. He was not knowledgeable of court proceedings and I had to seek other representation .
reviews.ownerResponse: Responding to this rare critique, they are valid in their frustration, as both parties usually are in a domestic split, but misdirect it. Lawyers are similarly frustrated when a client, committed to belief in their position, fail to lead to effective witnesses or evidence to support that position; or where procedural violations by other parties erode the client's faith in the system. Nonetheless, we tirelessly advocate for the client with what is available. We urge them to consider how courts will perceive material, and aggressively redress opposition violations; but  we also assist in substituting counsel even at the early stages of litigation, when requested by the client. We are sorry for the discontent experienced in this domestic case, and wish you luck in the protracted litigation.

Made things very easy and clear for my father to understand and helped us get a solution for our issues! Thank you so much!
Very pleasant and informative. Highly recommend.

Mr. Sperr has been very helpful in setting up estate planning for my father . He explains everything in layman’s terms making it easy to understand. We will use him for our own estate planning as well as recommend him to others.
Brad helped me set up a will and other documents like power of attorney. He is respectful, knowledgeable, efficient, and patient with questions!
Everything was accurate and easy to understand.

Brad Sperr is a very polite and professional person. He is receptive to client's questions. My one criticism is that several of my documents had typographical errors that I pointed out before the meeting to sign the documents, and some of these typos, such as birthdate and marriage date were not corrected until I went to sign the documents. These documents are incredibly important and I would advise anyone with any attorney, not just Brad, to review and review again to confirm corrections have been made.
I needed professional advice on how to approach a situation that suddenly came up.  Even though it was a free consultation, they were very patient, understanding, and knowledgeable with my questions.

My wife and I contacted the Sperr Law office recently. He was very accommodating, offering a no-charge telephone consultat. We reviewed our former trust and agreed to the State of GA necessary changes. We updated our details online, later reviewed them in his office and finalized them a week later. All for a reasonable fee. Brad Sperr specializes in wills and probate law and after two previous efforts in another state, we feel very confident we now have a solid will and healthcare directive in place. I would highly recommend the Sperr Law office and Brad Sperr.

Alec was absolutely amazing he made our closing easy an painless. He explained everything in depth an made sure we understood everything. He was so welcoming and made us feel comfortable thank y’all so much

Will Leach was phenomenal to work with! I had a property boundary issue and Will was extremely helpful to present all of the documents needed to resolve the problem.  He was very knowledgeable and I appreciate that he took the time needed to answer all of my questions.

My wife and I recently made a couple of real estate transactions and we were fortunate enough to get to use Quarterman & Hodson.  Autumn Triplett was an absolute pleasure to work with.  GREAT real estate attorney!  I can't recommend them, and her enough!

Their office space, meeting rooms and the facility in general is beyond any expectation or preconceived notion I ever had about an attorneys office.  Autumn offered snacks and refreshments during our wait(I always arrive early, closings were prompt and executed quickly).

All documents were correct and professionally composed.  Everyone inside the office was very friendly and made us feel as if we were family friends.

We will definitely be using them, and hopefully Autumn for any and all future real estate transactions.  Five out of five!!

Excellent service. I’d highly recommend Will Leech and his team. We had a commercial closing handled in under 30 minutes with all the support we could ask for building operating documents on the back end.

I recently had the pleasure of working with QHTL attorneys on a real estate closing, and I cannot recommend them highly enough. Especially, working with Will Leach was a pleasure . He was incredibly patient and diligent throughout the entire process, which was particularly crucial given the complexities of the deal. From the start, he took the time to explain every detail, ensuring I understood each step. His patience was a huge relief, especially when we ran into unexpected hurdles. He handled every issue with a calm and methodical approach, working tirelessly behind the scenes to find solutions and keep the closing on track. Will’s diligence in reviewing every document and communicating with all parties involved was truly impressive. He caught several potential issues that could have delayed the closing, and his proactive work was instrumental in making sure we closed on time. He was always available to answer my questions and kept me informed every step of the way. If you're looking for an attorney who is not only an expert in real estate law but also genuinely committed to his clients, look no further than Will Leach. He’s the reason the deal got done, and I'm so grateful for his outstanding work.

QHTL is one of the best firms I have ever had the pleasure of working with. I am so happy I hired them! The entire staff welcomed us with that good ol' southern hospitality and warm smiles. Each member was happy to answer any and all questions we had at anytime. In particular however, Lawyer Leach assisted us every step of the way and I couldn't be more grateful for him. It's been an absolute headache to deal with my late-dad's estate and sell it due to outstanding liens and no will. Leach had my back every step of the way and did his absolute best to make this process smooth as possible for me and my family (he did exceptionally well at navigating the reoccurring disagreements we had amongst ourselves as siblings). You can tell this man really loves and values what he does for work as he ensures his work is of high quality for each and every one of his clients. If only I could give this man 10 stars for his outstanding service! We are forever grateful for his wisdom and guidance as we navigated this real estate journey! Thanks again so much QHTL fam!

Stay away from this firm.  They only care about making money.  They also seem overbooked and too busy.  Never got a timely response.  When I did interact with them, it was curt and dismissive.  Do not work with Will Leach.  Let say he's not the sharpest tool in the shed, and makes up for this by being passive aggressive and condescending.  Why would you do a job that you don't like.

QHTL is my go-to choice for closing attorneys! As a realtor, I've worked with many attorneys, but Autumn Triplett truly stands out. Her professionalism and attention to detail make every closing a seamless experience. She is always ready to help, providing valuable insights and guidance that make a significant difference. I appreciate her proactive approach, which eases the stress of the closing process. I highly recommend QHTL and Autumn to anyone looking for reliable and knowledgeable closing attorneys. They consistently exceed my expectations!
Big shout out to Kayla! She took the time to thoroughly help me with some legal questions and was very transparent and professional! Great practice! Highly recommend!

WARNING!!! DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY. THEY LET AN ILLEGAL SALE OF A HOME GO THROUGH WITH ZERO PERMITS AND NO CERTIFICATE OF OCCUPANCY. THEY WERE SUPPOSED TO OBTAIN C.O. 5 DAYS AFTER CLOSING AND NEVER DID. WE ARE NOW STUCK IN A HOME LOAN THEY SHOULD HAVE DONE THERE DUE DILIGENCE ON AND DID NOT. COMPLETELY FAILED US AS A CLIENT. (Only gave one star because I couldn’t choose zero).

I needed to get a quit claim deed for my home in order to change my last name due to marriage.  When I tried calling the attorney who had done the closing for my house three years prior, there was no answer multiple times.  I used google reviews to find a highly rated real estate attorney, and that's where Quarterman, Hodson, Triplett & Leach come in to the picture.  I called and immediately got an answer, within an hour received an introduction letter, and after sending back the information they requested, told to expect the deed in a week.  They emailed the next day saying it was ready!  I was shocked.  I went in and signed, which was very easy, quick, and they were extremely polite and professional. Later that afternoon, they emailed and it was ALREADY filed with Athens Clarke county!  They emailed me a copy, and of course the original will be sent from the county.  I could never have imagined an easier transaction, and the excellent treatment from this law practice, and their contact person Kayla Frost.  I highly recommend them!
Will Leach is a competent and efficient attorney.

Quarterman, Hodson, Triplett & Leach have been our go to attorneys for several years. Will Leach and Autumn Triplett are professional, thorough, and responsive! Completing personal real estate transactions, business purchases and hundreds of transactions for our real estate brokerage. You will not be disappointed with the team at QHTL!
QHTL has been proudly serving metro Athens-Oconee and Northeast Georgia as the premier real estate and business law firm since 1974.
Excellent attorneys are always friendly and happy to help!
Best place to close a real estate transaction in town!
Awesome organization and great staff! I highly recommend them!
Good people and easy to work with.
Very professional group of people who helped me close on my first property with ease! Definitely recommend!

Autumn was the closing attorney for the purchase our new home in November. She was professional, knowledgable, and took the time to explain things when necessary. She and the other staff members were so friendly and efficient and the office was warm and inviting! We appreciate it and highy recommend!
Just a great bunch of folks to do business with!

As a realtor & investor, it's always a pleasure when you can find a law firm that goes above and beyond their clients expectations. In particular, it is always a pleasure to work with Autumn. She is very thorough and keeps me in the loop about my title searches, closings and is a prompt communicator.
Thanks so much for arranging our closing right after your wedding. Everything was so well organized. We know it was a rush but it really helped us out coming from NJ. Love the new house.
Very friendly. Takes the time to explain things in detail. I was very satisfied.
Great service
Knowledgeable and reliable. Used for years.
Professional advice and honest people you can trust.
Very professional people that helped me with the closing of my house

Whoever is at the front desk needs some training on how to answer the phone. I called to spend my money at your business there's no reason to answer the phone as if you're being bothered. Is a law office, no way you should be answering the phone with "hull firm...." . That's not how you answer a phone. Definitely will skip right on down to the next listing and hire someone else who is a little bit more excited to get my business.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for reaching out and sharing your experience. I’m genuinely sorry to hear about your frustration, as that is never the experience we want anyone to have with our firm.

I have personally reviewed our firm’s call logs and intake records and, at this time, I do not see your name or contact information reflected anywhere in our systems. Because of that, I’m not certain where the miscommunication may have occurred.

That said, I want to be very clear that we take concerns like this seriously, and I welcome the opportunity to connect with you directly. Our advocacy and client support are a point of pride for our firm, and I am confident that if you reach out again, we can ensure you receive the level of professionalism and care we are known for.

Please feel free to contact our office again at your convenience, and we will be happy to assist you.

Sincerely,
Nicole Hull

reviews.text: From the beginning they were very intentional about finding the best way to support our child. Thank you for making this experience less stressful and fighting for my son to get what he needs to be successful!

Absolutely amazing. The mere mention of their name to the school district and everything we needed for our child "magically" fell into place. The district was suddenly cooperative, our special needs child was given transportation, extended school year, expanded AAC device assistance, and more- immediately- with merely the mention and presence of Ms. Hull. Ever so thankful for her and her firm's assistance.

Initially, we were impressed with Nicole. She seemed to genuine care about our child. A couple of months into her representating our child, we missed a payment by a couple of days. We received an email that our case was “on hold” until we made a payment. We made the payment immediately. The next meeting she attended she was unprepared and even said things against what we were requesting. The apple looks good on the outside, but be careful when you take a bite because it’s not what it seems on the outside. Money is the priority with this attorney.

So I just hired another attorney by 1st week in October  and was in court and case closed  in under 35-45 days.

The GAL scared her away and she left us high and dry with no representation    Don’t hire her unless you want to loose your case.  I’m reporting all these people including the GAL to the bar. She never cared at all or she could have done something besides making it worse. Don’t waste your money on this lawyer.

We were told an agreement would be emailed for signature.  Weeks have passed since we've heard from anyone at the firm.  We've followed up with multiple calls and received no call back.  We are now stuck with no representation and filling out court documents on our own as we trusted the word of Nicole and her firm.  If you're going to require potential clients to pay for an initial consultation, you should at least be upfront and tell them if you can't/won't represent them.

reviews.text:
Now that we’re in our 70s, Phil and I knew it was time (past time🙄) to replace our 40-year-old simple will made when we had 3 young children and not much else. Nate was recommended by a trusted friend in our Sunday “School” class.

What an eye-opening experience - nothing is simple anymore!

Without Nate’s expertise, inexhaustible patience and good humor, we could never have survived the process of creating the revocable living trust (RLT) that covers all the bases: assets, properties, future illnesses, etc. The main goal was accomplished, which was to make it much easier on our 3 married daughters and 7 grandchildren to negotiate the inheritance details after we die.

Nate was absolutely indispensable - and also delightful. We highly recommend him. That having been said, he’s the first lawyer I’ve ever almost loved.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for such kind words Sallie!  You and Phil were a joy to work with.  Thanks again for trusting me with your estate plan.  Never hesitate to call if you have additional questions.

reviews.text: Nate was so, so helpful in setting up a trust for my mom and being able to retain far more of her assets than I imagined possible. I have been having to do everything by myself and have been so overwhelmed and he was extremely patient about answering all of my questions and eased my anxiety a lot by giving me numbered lists of what I needed to be doing and what I was responsible for. I have recommended him to others for getting something set up for their parents because now that I'm in this situation, I realize how important it is to plan in advance. I also appreciate how caring he was when dealing with my mom and he treated her like the competent adult that she is instead of acting like she didn't understand (she had a stroke and is now nonverbal). I didn't have to deal with his office staff very much, but when I did, they were just as excellent. Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for trusting me to assist.  I hope thing are still going well for you and your mom.

reviews.ownerResponse: I have to admit. I've been in practice for 31 years and have never received such a complimentary, humbling and generous review...ever. I have always answered and returned calls. No one ever gets pushed off on a paralegal, secretary or receptionist. I don't ask for money up front even if the call lasts an hour. If I can help someone over the phone and not have to drag them all the way out to sit in a stuffy-old office, I'd much rather do that. Saying 'Thank you' is way too weak to express my gratitude. I hope the advice is effective, but I'm here if needed. I'm not planning on going anywhere anytime soon. Good luck and thank you very, very much.

reviews.text: I was told to call him by legal match.com i called this man for a week straight him not answering my calls or calling me back and when i finally got him on the everything that had happened to me he try to justify i wasn’t on the phone with him very log before i told him that he was not the lawyer for me and on top of that when we started talking he didn’t know anything about my case would i recommend this attorney no, I would not and I wanna see him reply saying this never took place because if he does he straight up lying if I really had a good case you didn’t even take the time to even find out if i had a good case and the body cam footage you are supposed to be a lawyer so you should have known how i got it I stand on what i said if you have a police misconduct case dont call this man he has conflict of interest basically from being a cop he side with the cop he thinks they’re great they’re not
reviews.ownerResponse: This office has been serving all of Georgia since 1995. I personally speak with close to 1000 people a year. Most only want advice or end up needing only advice. Since I speak with so many people I can only respond to people with real problems. It seems that Legal Match did a poor job when it reviewed Mr. Clark's issue. They are supposed to provide me with only issues I signed up with them to help. Either Mr. Clark called me in error or I was matched in error. I'm sorry Mr. Clark had difficulty in getting help, but I'm certain if he really had a good case, some lawyer would have helped him by now. Lawyers don't wait to jump on "a good case." Legal Match provides only a tiny amount of information on a case. It is the job of the lawyer to inquire into every aspect of the incident. Given my law enforcement background, it was important to rule out anything Mr. Clark did that could have been interpreted by the police as a threat and he didn't like those questions. If you can successfully defend a case during the interview stage means there's a problem with it and you will certainly lose.  Mr. Clark did not give me enough time on the phone before getting upset with the questions used to determine whether he had a case or not. I wasn't even on the phone long enough to suggest taking his video to the DA's Office and filing criminal charges against the cops for assault and battery and civil rights violations. I wouldn't have stayed in business for '30 years' if I hadn't rattled a few Internal Affairs Officers with violations their officers committed.

reviews.text: The counsel wants to give advice before understanding the situation fully,  horrible professionalism.  Spits in the face of a disabled veteran trying to get help with a slumlord taking advantage of me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Counsel did no such thing. The caller was overly eager to convince counsel that he was right and counsel was wrong. The advice given was logical, clear, concise and reasonable. Counsel was never advised about the caller allegedly being a 'disabled vet.' Being a voice on the phone, he could claim he was anything or anybody. He was highly impatient, spoke condescendingly as if he was the authority on a topic he knew little to nothing about. Counsel ended the call because the caller was combative, argumentative and unwilling to listen to reason and had an excuse for everything suggested. He was told counsel could not help him under these circumstances and politely terminated the call. He then stalked counsel by leaving multiple phone messages all within a 5-6 minute period, presumably to reach him again in an effort to "tell counsel" off. Insofar that what counsel and the caller discussed is confidential, suffice it to say that 'you had to have been there' to have fully appreciated his attitude during the free consultation.

When I asked him about this in an email, and if he was also dealing with the other side,  he emailed back and he then seemed to get really agitated, because he rambled on for a long paragraph, sounding very aggressive, like he started threatening me with a SWAT team, lol. I hired John back in 2018 to handle a case for me. I continued to pay as needed ( several thousands of dollars). This past December 2022 we we’re finally ready to go to trial. He sent emails letting me know when my trial date was. The following week I get an email stating that he had canceled my trial because he didn’t think we would win and all of the other persons lawyers had quit on her. She also moved to a different state (as if that had anything to do with me). He did contact the other party and said he could make it go away if she signed off on it. John also filed “with prejudice” meaning no other lawyer can ever file against the other party.

When my wife (who is an estate lawyer) told John what he did was illegal, he said “well we both know it was but I thought it was the best thing to do”. We then asked would we get any money back and he said “No”. I truly think John has a great practice if you’re looking from a crooks prospective. That is: get as much money as he can from his client, then cancel the case right before trial, keep all the client’s money and do the same to the next client.

I spoke to John last week and asked him to produce all my receipts on how much I paid him. He provided me the wrong number, which was also an estimate. I told him he had a week to do the right thing or I was filing a Bar Complaint. The Bar doesn’t tolerate lawyers like him. They will ask for far more than I’m asking for. I will be filing a complaint on Monday morning along with retaining another lawyer. At that point I’ll be asking for the same damages as I was asking for before he canceled my trail. DO NOT HIRE THIS GUY. I’m sure he does this with a lot of his clients. To be honest, the only reason I retained him was because my brother-in-law suggested him. After mentioning this to my brother-in-law, well he was very disappointed and shocked.

Again, I will be filing a complaint with the Bar and anyone who has been done wronged by John McArthur now know your rights. Prior to becoming a lawyer you must get sworn in under oath that you will protect your client. John did the opposite. One ⭐️ is actually being generous.

Mr. McArthur is not the type of lawyer that will communicate what he has planned, but he knows what he's doing and what is best for the defendant. He was recommended to me for my son's case, and I could not have hired a better lawyer. He was able to drop 2 murder charges, and he negotiated the best deal we could have hoped for my son. I will be forever grateful. God bless you, Mr. McArthur.
Without a single promise, he did a great job. Eternally grateful to Mr. McArthur.

Met with john brought in my arrest report.he said $500.00 he can get it dismissed.all i can say is be careful with bait/switch ,a week before trial he said he needed $1000.00 my results were 6 months probation $250 and $500 fine .I’ll leave it up to you if you want to use him .my charge was reckless  conduct .

William "Bill" McArthur was completely dishonest throughout the entire time. My husband hired McArthur and dealing with him has been a complete pain in the ass. My husband is currently incarcerated and every time he calls it’s the same story. His lawyer isn’t available, he can’t answer or doesn’t know anything regarding his case, or he hasn’t came by to meet with him when he was supposed to. It’s extremely stressful because when he lacks it becomes a problem that his family has to figure out. It’s already hard and stressful enough for us. My husband has been in jail for almost four months and since he’s been incarcerated McAuthur has only showed up for court and filled a motion (which was done both times last minute). He’s also made one visit and that was probably because I asked him to meet me at the jail to take care of a payment. He doesn’t respond to text messages or “he’s out of office” all the time. His communication is terrible and his attitude is very unprofessional. McArthur has had my husbands discovery regarding his case for at least a month if not more and has not took the time to go discuss his case with him. I nor my husband should have to feel uncomfortable speaking with his attorney. He acts as if we’re bugging him and he basically avoids him. I just wouldn’t recommend his legal representation. We’re more than half way done paying him and it sucks feeling like it’s been wasted, especially when we have other things that could’ve been handled. I typically try not to go as far as leaving negative reviews, However I’ve given this man the benefit of doubt too long and now it’s just becoming ridiculous. I’ll be searching for new legal representation if this doesn’t get on track within the next two weeks. If anything changes I will update my review but for now I really wish I could give him less than one star.

I used John Baker, Law firm for working through the complexities of an automotive wreck and related legal disputes with the other drivers insurance company. My goal was to ensure I was treated fairly. When looking for someone to provide guidance on my case I found and discussed my situation with John. He provided me with a solid, detailed outline of what to expect when encountering reluctant agents. Roughly a month later I hired John and found from the beginning John had provided me with sound advice. The case seemed to take longer than I would have expected but John handled the case with care and his follow ups and status reports showed he remained engaged with the other drivers insurance. The settlement John negotiated was reasonable and met my expectations. I would recommend his services and I would use John again if I had another wreck related case to pursue.
John has many years of litigation experience and is one of the most honest and ethical lawyers I know.
John Baker has expertly represented myself, my family and my trusted clients for more than 20 years as the preeminent business litigator of metro Athens-Oconee. He also cooks some damn good BBQ!

John is honest and tough. I couldn’t have asked him to work any harder on my case. The insurance company was trying to screw me out of money owed to me after someone pulled out in front of me and totaled my car! I got a lot more from my case than I would if I tried to fight the other persons insurance on my own.

John Baker represented me in a civil litigation lawsuit and was there for me personally and professionally every step of the way. He was immediately responsive to any questions I had. I would recommend him 100% . I couldn't have done it without him. He is the very best as he truly cares about his clients. Thank you for everything John.

John Baker is a fabulous attorney!  Highly intelligent, he thinks outside the box and is able to give clear answers on complicated legal situations.  John has helped my family on two separate legal issues pertaining to our home. He was able to be firm and concise and let the opposition know exactly what we all expected and how we would proceed.  Both times he negotiated successfully and we were completely compensated. John is exceptionally knowledgeable of the law. He has great relationships with other attorneys as well as the judges and was able to get our cases wrapped up quickly.  We would highly recommend John Baker and his firm.

John Baker represented me in a Civil Litigation lawsuit that recently came to resolution. He provided me with an overwhelming amount of kindness and support through out the entire process. John Baker went above and beyond his fiduciary responsibility to guide and most importantly protect me from the moment I first spoke with him.  I would recommend Baker & Slider LLC to anyone in need of representation in this arena. I hope I do not need their services in the future, but if I do, I know I will always have a safe place to land here.

Being a former client of Mr Baker’s, I can say with certainty, he goes out of his way for his clients and has been so kind, not only to me but my family, as well, during a difficult time. I will definitely recommend him to all my friends and family in the future. And to anyone reading this review, go to John Baker first,  so that you don’t waste your time with others. You’ll be glad you did!

Five extra bright stars for John Baker of Baker & Slider, LLC.  John walked with us through a personal injury situation which is an often lengthy tedious journey. He was always positive, compassionate and willing to answer any question.  John will be an experienced advocate in your corner every step of the way!
K & D Eubanks

I have never been in an attorney's office where I felt comfortable or felt as if someone really cared until I stepped foot in the office of Baker & Slider. John Baker was very compassionate and really cared about our case and what had happened to us. He was honest from the very first meeting, kept us informed, and handled everything to make things as stress free as possible for us. I hope we never need an attorney again, but if we do I will definitely go back to Baker & Slider. Would give them a 10 star rating if I could. Excellent Service!

John Baker handled the legal needs of Athens Area Homeless Shelter professionally, competently, patiently and with deep care from start to finish.  He took the time to explain each step of the way not only to me, running point for our organization, but also to the satisfaction of our Executive Committee.  He also provided his services free of charge, as a service to the community - and all leading to an ideal outcome for Athens Area Homeless Shelter.  We will work with Baker&Slider for our future legal needs and heartily recommend them in the community!
John Baker was absolutely great to us. He was always very diligent with our case and always made sure we were informed in every step of the way.
John Baker advised me on what to do when my family and I were working on settling a car crash settlement and he gave us great advice!

WARNING! When I first spoke with Jon I had a great impression. After emailing over all the information he requested he informed me that we would need to make a demand letter. After telling him I would like his assistance with that, I was ghosted. I reached out multiple times over 2 months before finally making this post. I can't speak on his work, but I can say he is likely to ghost you so it may not be worth wasting your time here.
Very unprofessional.
I wouldn't hesitate to call Jon Mills again.

Jon Mills has stood with my family for around 8 years now. He is definitely a no-nonsense lawyer. But once you prove to him that you are 100 % for doing what's right. He will stand with you all the way. He has been nothing but a blessing to our family.

I divorced a lieutenant/dupty in the same county that he worked. With the harassment and the deck stacked against me Mr. Mills didn't hesitate to subpoena  the SHERIFF and  didn't hold back one bit when he cross examined him. Needless to say I won my case with my now ex paying my attirbey fees. He is the Judge Judy of the courtroom.
Never returned my phone call after 2 messages left".
Best attorney.

Jon Mills is a professional. He’s blunt, he knows what he’s doing and he’s straight to the point. He gets the job done. Our case was very unique and rare. And some how still won with Jon. Jon is an honest man. HE IS A DAWG in the court room! We cannot wait to use him again soon. WE HIGHLY RECOMMEND MR. MILLS!

Over the past several years there were a lot of things I was not aware of. Jon has gone over the top to provide knowledgeable and legal ways to conduct business. He has helped provide a solid foundation that allows me to grow. I highly recommend to anyone seeking legal advice in any avenue. I have not met anyone that knows the law as well as Jon.
Recommended to me by a friend. Jon Mills is honest, dependable, and responsive. He ended up charging less than I expected. Very satisfied. I definitely recommend.
I can't say enough good things about Mr. Mills! Brutly honest and fair!
It would take far too long. I can only say, he saved our lives.

Laurie was clearly a seasoned professional and did an excellent job facilitating the closing for both our family and the sellers. Her communication was clear, and her expertise was evident every step of the way.

We felt confident in their representation, and everything went smoothly from start to finish. Highly recommend.
