I had such a great experience working with Alex and Jason on my car accident case. They made the entire process so easy and took so much stress off my shoulders. From start to finish, I always felt supported and informed.

I also want to give a huge shoutout to Linda, their paralegal. She is truly amazing. Not once did she make me feel like I was bothering her, even when I had small questions or worries. She was patient, kind, and always quick to help.

I’m so grateful for this team. If you need attorneys who are not only skilled but genuinely care about their clients, Alex, Jason, and Linda are the ones to call!
Highly recommend if you need an accident attorney. Jason, Linda and Kara were all so very easy to work with and communicate with! Thank yall so much.

My teenage son was involved in a vehicle crash where he was not at fault. He sustained some injuries but fortunately was spared anything worse. This was his first crash and ours as well so we were in need of some guidance. Jason was professional and thorough as he walked us through every step. Keeping us updated was very important to us and Jason never missed a beat! We were more than satisfied with our judgement and although I don’t look forward to having to use an attorney again, if I do, I know exactly who I’ll trust with my families best interests.

Absolutely one of a kind law firm. Thank you for all your hard work Jason.  You have the absolute best law firm around one of a kind which made everything so much easier. Linda worked hard and stayed in contact and always had a shoulder or ear when needed. Alex is awesome couldn’t have made so many decisions without him by our side at the end. Thanks so much Jason, Linda and Alex ya’ll ROCKED it! Best Law firm around if you need an attorney who has your back look no further! Wouldn’t have wanted my life, my kids lives or my settlement issues in anyone else’s hands!

IF YOU NEED A CRASH LAWYER!!!!
Such great people! Never made me feel like I was nagging them with all of the questions I had about the car wreck! Also work so hard to get you what you deserve. Very thankful for them!!

I can’t thank Fletcher & Malcom, and their entire staff enough for their incredible work that they did on my traffic accident case. From the very first call Fletcher & Malcom showed true dedication and compassion. Throughout the process they were easy to work with, and always made me feel like a priority. Thanks to their hard work and persistence the case resulted in a largely successful settlement. The settlement has made a huge difference in our family. Fletcher & Malcom deliver results and I highly recommend them for any of your legal needs!
Very professional and always looking out for his client’s best interest. You will not find another attorney that would do a better job. Highly recommend!

I hope that no one ever has to get into a car accident but when we did, we got a referral to one of the best attorneys I have ever had the privilege of working with attorney. Fletcher handled things quickly and professionally and got the claim settled not that it’s all about money, but definitely for more than we expected! If you are ever in a car, accident Fletcher and Malcolm is definitely the place to go! I Will never use anyone else! Also, the compassion that he uses with all parties Involved makes him one of a kind the experience that he has from all different aspects of accidents from being in law-enforcement, and seeing it from both sides, gives him a definite upper hand on anyone that you could hire!

Great experience with Attorney Jason Fletcher. Don't hesitate to call Jason and team if you were injured in a car crash. They will get the job done for you. They are the experts on car crashes and personal injury cases. Professional, knowledgeable, and results oriented.

Jason Fletcher represented me in a very contentious divorce. Upon retaining him as my attorney, he stated, "The only thing I can GUARANTEE you is I will give you my best. I am in this fight with you." That statement alone earned my trust. I had the larger financial exposure, but I never would have imagined that it would take 969 days to cross the finish line (no fault of ours) Jason was strategic and took very calculated risks. In the end,  I retained all my assets. As a result of Jason's commitment to excellence, I divorced in the BLACK ( no deficit, not emotionally or financially). My gratitude is boundless. I don't believe I could have ever found another attorney who would have stayed in the battle that long.
After my car accident Jason and his team did a great job in resolving a complicated case and getting me paid what was owed! Awesome firm that knows what they’re doing with car accidents!
Hands down the best attorney! Very detailed and reliable. I would recommend him to anyone!

I had a car accident earlier this year, i spent several days in the hospital due to this accident.  Fletcher &Malcom Law worked hard on my case and did an outstanding job.  I highly recommend Fletcher & Malcom  Law for any of your accident needs.  Fletcher & Malcom far exceeded my expectations for my accident case.
Great guys that treated me like family, answered all my questions, and got me what I deserved

I recently found myself in need of a last-minute contract review for my business and turned to Linda for help. She promptly arranged a quick phone call with Alex, who was incredibly responsive and guided me through the process efficiently. His thorough review gave me the legal insights I needed, especially given the tight deadline I was facing. I highly recommend their expertise to anyone in need of legal advice.

Additionally, I appreciated that Linda took the time to check in with me afterward to ensure I didn't have any further questions or needs. This level of follow-up is becoming increasingly rare, and it made a significant difference in my experience.

This law firm handled my auto accident case and recovered a just settlement for me. The insurance company gave me the run around and proposed a low ball offer. Linda Arnold handled my paperwork submissions and kept everything on track and rolling smoothly. I would highly recommend this law firm.

There is no other legal council that I would select to represent me a vehicle accident/crash if I needed it. I have personally witnessed Jason investigate some of the worst accidents imaginable. Jason Fletcher is thorough from start to finish, and beyond the mile. 5/5 is an understatement on his performance and work ethic.

My wife was rear ended on her way home from work one night.  Fletcher Law, LLC was a local attorney’s office that we chose. What a blessing that choice ended up being for us. The whole team was always very accessible, professional, and empathetic for what we were going through. My wife already had some back issues, and this sent her down a very painful road. Their team was very focused on getting us the compensation needed for her care and pain and suffering. They were able to get us the results that we had hope for.

We would definitely recommend them for any legal help needed in this arena!

Alexander Malcom did the most excellent job in representing me in a very difficult situation against a contractor who performed work at my home.  I felt confident I was well represented through the whole process. I would recommend Fletcher & Malcom Law to anyone who needs council.

I could go on and on about this man. He is absolutely amazing. He goes above and beyond. Not only is this man a great person but he is compassionate about what he is doing. He is very professional, upfront and honest and is committed 100% to doing his best. He was always willing to answer any questions I had and if he is unavailable gets back to you, timely manner. If you are looking for a really great lawyer, he is the best.

I had a wonderful experience with Jason Fletcher and Alex Malcom. They were very knowledgeable and friendly. They were both extremely supportive and helped me greatly while navigating through a difficult situation. I would highly recommend them to anyone in need of an attorney.
Great group of people ! Goes above and beyond , would definitely recommend and would definitely use this firm again!
The best of the best!! Highly recommend! Jason was the most communicative attorney, very knowledgeable & amazing!
Very professional. Fast results. Easy to work with and was always accessible. Would give 10 stars if I could. Definitely recommend this firm for your legal needs.

Jason is great at what he does! He took the time to listen to all the details of my situation and we won our case. He is very thorough, respectful and takes pride in his work! I definitely recommend Fletcher Law!

Jason has helped me graciously! He is such a wonderful person! He genuinely cares so much about our situations and takes our concerns into consideration. He never forgets the fact that we are all humans and we all go through stuff in our life at one point and he cares for the well being of our entire life. I highly recommend Jason as your family law attorney, you won’t be disappointed at all! Stay safe out there!

Mr. Fletcher was recommended to me after my car was backed into. From the first meeting I knew he would fight for me to have all of the damage to my car covered. Mr. Fletcher and Linda were always available for any question and kept me updated about the status of my case. Due to his previous career as a GSP officer he definitely knows the laws. I can't say enough about how highly I recommend him. He is a fantastic lawyer!

Truthfully was a blessing having you work on my case. The dedication you a your team showed was outstanding an amazing.! I definitely will refer anyone to y’all an keep the good work coming once again thanks

Jason is by far the best Lawyer I’ve ever had! He’s very personable and professional. Jason is very well versed in GA Law because of his time being a State Trooper, and walks you through your entire case, and makes you feel confident in the outcome without a bunch of overwhelming Legal Jargon. He’s thorough, easily reachable, and above all else TRUSTWORTHY! Look no further for a Lawyer, because you won’t find anyone more Dedicated to you or your case than Jason.

Jason is such a compassionate person! He made sure that I understood the entire process. He has so much experience and uses his knowledge as a trooper to reconstruct accident scenes. He really cares about you not just as a client but I have made a lifelong friend. If you are wanting the best, Jason is your guy!

I highly recommend Jason Fletcher as a personal injury attorney. He did an excellent job representing me in my case and I couldn't be happier with the outcome. Not only was he extremely knowledgeable and skilled in navigating the legal process, but he was also incredibly responsive and helpful throughout the entire experience. His background as a Georgia State Patrol officer proved to be a pivotal moment in changing the case in my favor. He was able to bring a unique perspective and understanding to the case that ultimately led to a successful outcome. He always made himself available to answer my questions and address any concerns I had. I couldn't have asked for a better attorney to have on my side and I am grateful for all that he did for me. If you are in need of a personal injury attorney, I highly recommend giving Jason Fletcher a call

I was in an abusive marriage with two young infants, and I struggled to safely find an escape route. After my initial consultation with Jason Fletcher, he equipped me with the confidence and plan I needed to finally get myself and my children out of the house away from my abuser. Mr. Fletcher validated the situation I currently found myself in and showed me the worth of my life and freedom. The arduous divorce process took about eleven months, but Mr. Fletcher helped explain and walked with me through the entire process. He is always available for me no matter the issue, and he has protected me just like an older brother would. My hope is that no one will ever have to go through a divorce, but if you find yourself in the throes of one, Mr. Jason Fletcher is the attorney you need by your side. If you find yourself in any type of abusive relationship, get help immediately. Your life and your children's lives may depend on it.
Jason Fletcher is hands down the best attorney I’ve ever met! He is honest, reliable, professional, and truly has your back from start to finish! I cannot recommend him enough.
Jason was great in helping get through my divorce quick and clean !!! If you need an attorney that’s gonna fight for you and not quit until you’re satisfied choose Fletcher law !!!!!!

I was referred Jason Fletcher for a divorce case, and he went above and beyond. He took the time to listen to every detail of my story and not only got the case solved in a timely manner, but gave great advice as well. He is very professional and very understanding.

Jason made a very difficult and heartbreaking situation much easier than it could have been. He was very communicative, personable, and fought for what was right. Definitely felt like it was always someone who had my back. I’d recommend him to anyone who needs a divorce lawyer!

Jason Fletcher is very personable and is more than willing to help at all times including after hours. He fought very hard for my friend and I after we went through a traumatic accident. Jason was a pleasure to work with! He was communicative throughout my case and made me feel like I was a priority. Overall, I would definitely recommended his services to those in need!
Jason Fletcher is a great all around attorney!  So hardworking and is very attentive. Thank you Jason for helping me get what I deserve and going above and beyond!

Jason is more than a attorney, he becomes a friend. He cares about his clients. He works hard and is passionate about his job! He gets results fast and doesn't just take money .if Jason can't win your case then  No one can!!

Jason Fletcher is absolutely wonderful! He is the perfect attorney  to have working on your case.  He is very knowledgeable, kind and dIligent. He is hard-working and he truly cares for your best interest.  I give Jason a score of 11 out of 10. I highly recommend this attorney who has a unique coupling of law enforcement experience and courtroom experience. Thank you Jason.

I had absolutely no faith in a good outcome from mediating my divorce,  but it was more than I thought was possible. Jason stuck to his guns all day and got a  workable agreement from a person obviously I can't work with!! I HIGHLY recommend Jason Fletcher for your legal issues. He is a take control man for sure. You will want him on your side. Listen to his advice.  It is spot on!

Jason is a fantastic attorney he is extremely knowledgeable of all aspects of family law. Jason is very detail oriented and goes above and beyond to uphold all laws. So if you are looking for top notch representation Jason Fletcher is your man.

reviews.text: Zero star service. Hard to get in touch with. Closing delays, additional documents requested less than 12 hours before closing (meaning somebody didn't do a diligent title search to begin with ) and then more delays. A closing that was scheduled for Oct 20, it is still ongoing as of Oct 30. I wouldn't recommend this firm at all. So many other customer service oriented lawyers in town, don't waste your time and money with this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: I suspect this was all because of the lender, we always do our best to meet our clients' needs.  But because , by Georgia law, we represent the lender in a closing, we have to deal with what the lenders require, sometimes hours before (OR  even after) the scheduled closing time, I suspect this was a last minute surprise from the lender's underwriting agents.  We have absolutely no control over that, but we do try to minimize the impact as best we can.  I have no idea who Leasing TPP is, they are not in our database as a client or a buyer/borrower) but if you were one of our closings, you can always call us     (use the telephone, it's always better than anonymous online complaints later after the closing when we can't address your issues),   we will always try our best to help you if you contact us before the closing, instead of complaining after the closing when we have no control over the situation.  btw, if the lender makes us do something, we have no control over that, whether we (or you) like it or not. We'll do our best, but remember the Golden Rule-- They who have the gold make the rules.  and that's not us.  we don't like it either, that's just the way it is.

reviews.text: Walter Harvey  charged me $5000 to defend me for a contempt of court civil lawsuit brought on by my ex wife in 2019. The case was dismissed in 2024 after just sitting in the judges docket with no work done on my behalf to get the case dismissed . Walter Harvey never let me (his client ) know the case was dismissed. When I found out online the case was dismissed with my own research 8 months post dismissal I confronted Walter via text and email in a nice manner to get an explanation. He confused the case with my already settled divorce case from 2018 and refused to provide accounting of his billable hours against my $5000 retaining fee he charged me. Now I have to waste my time and effort to go through the Georgia bar to get justice in this matter. I’m very disappointed in the services he provided me, his efforts to conceal his lack of efforts on my past, and his greediness to not give me back $5000 minus the actual billable hours he should have charged me to sit on a case for 5 years where no billable hours would have been generated.
terrible ppl verry unprofessional. do not use. beware
I w know these two for years!! Very good lawyers ! Always came thru for me!!!

Fair and honest attorneys in Jackson County Ga.  My divorce went way better than I ever imagined possible and finalized before the beginning of the new year.  Merry Christmas and Happy New Years to me....  Thank you  Tom Mc Cormack for making DIVORCE not such a bad word.... It's worth every penny and my freedom..

DO NOT HIRE THESE CROOKS IF YOU ARE GETTING DIVORCED, ESPECIALLY IF THERE ARE CHILDREN INVOLVED!! Thomas McCormack threatened me, his own client, manipulated me, lied to me, and said I may never see my own daughters again if I didn't sign custody over to their father! What was going on?! I knew very little about the law; but I did know that my lawyer was supposed to be on my side! He had my money though; that was all that mattered to him! After years of domestic violence I was scared and vulnerable; so I made one of the biggest mistakes of my life and signed those papers. My daughters were alienated from me and brainwashed against me after that. I had to take my ex back to court twice just to get to see them! In a nutshell, he helped get my own children stolen from me!! THOMAS MCCORMACK WILL LIE TO HIS OWN CLIENTS! I DON'T THINK HE HAS A CONSCIENCE AT ALL!

ABSOLUTELY HORRIBLE!! BEWARE!!!  Trying to save you money and time. A couple years of your time. Do not waste your money! Most unorganized group of people I have ever dealt with in business. In my opinion this firm committed highway robbery.

reviews.text: Please stay away if you are actually looking to get something done! He has been handling my fathers case since his accident in 2014. My father passed away in 2015 and here it is in 2018 and we still don’t have a settlement and he won’t return our phone calls. He still holds the rest of our fathers settlement money. He is a crook and a terrible lawyer when it comes to getting stuff done. I urge you to stay away!!!

I would have selected -5 stars if it were an option,  Tom McCormack may very well be the worst experienced and unprepared lawyer in Georgia, his office alone will tell the story, cluttered and chaotic sums him up.
I had a very simple car wreck case which he dragged out for 5 years just for me to receive less than what the insurance company originally offered, I felt as if he was never on my side, I also made the mistake of allowing him to Handel  my Chapter 7 bankruptcy, what a disaster!! after almost 2 years of getting nothing but excesses for the delays and requesting pay stubs every 3 months I still never got my case filed, I fired him and took my case to another local Lawyer( Scoot Tolbert) in only 6 days my case was filed and I had a court case and now its behind me, I would caution anyone from using Tom McCormack, unprepared, unprofessional, and one heck of an excuses machine. he comes off as a good ole boy with a big smile and charm, Don't be fooled.

I had to fight to get a check stub on my own which proved he made way more in order for Tim to change it. On February 28, 2025, I was hit by a DUI driver who fled the scene. After everything that happened, finding the right law firm was critical—and choosing Massey Law Firm was the best decision I made.

From my very first call, I spoke with a real person—not automated prompts. I was welcomed into the office and met Mr. Jose, who was professional, compassionate, and attentive. My husband was facing serious charges: drug trafficking and possession of marijuana, with a potential sentence of 5 to 30 years in prison. From the very beginning, Attorney Freddrell Green took swift, strategic action. He successfully had the drug trafficking charge reduced to possession with intent, and negotiated a plea agreement that significantly changed the course of our lives. The plea allowed for time served with the possibility of up to five years but ultimately, the final decision rested with the judge.
Even while enduring a personal tragedy of his own, Attorney Green never wavered in his commitment to our case. He worked tirelessly, with unwavering determination, treating our family as if it were his own.
Thanks to his relentless dedication, legal expertise, and valuable connections even in a different county over two hours away my husband was sentenced to time served and probation. What once felt impossible became a testimony of hope, perseverance, and faith.
We are forever grateful for Attorney Green. We truly believe that God worked through him and his network to bring us through one of the darkest chapters of our lives. If you're searching for someone to fight for you with heart, strength, and experience look no further.

reviews.text:
I was never a client of this firm, yet they recklessly exposed my credit card information and medical records in discovery materials. Adobe confirmed (Case #109032) that this disclosure violated their Terms of Use—a finding that underscores the firm’s blatant disregard for data security and privacy compliance.

What makes this worse is that the transmission occurred via Adobe Acrobat Cloud, which is not a court-approved e-service platform under Georgia’s Uniform Superior Court Rules. The firm failed to follow basic compliance protocols and didn’t even appear to understand them. Transmitting sensitive third-party data without consent or procedural authorization is not just negligent it’s indefensible.

This mishandling of highly sensitive information was entirely unrelated to the underlying case. It reflects a serious breach of duty, professionalism, and ethics.

After counsel flagged this review for removal, Google conducted a manual factual review and reinstated it in full.
Terrible!!!!
Terrible

Kelly Holloway is the best estate planning attorney in the area. I have used her and her firms services for many years. Kelly and team are available when I need to meet and very helpful when I need to adjust my estate plans every couple years since life undoubtedly always changes. I hear her name often from other professionals in the area which means my positive experiences are not unique. I feel comforted each time after working with Kelly and the EHDH estate planning team.

If you have any will or estate planning needs I highly recommend getting on their list. Kelly and the EHDH estate planning team are very good at what they do which results in them remaining busy. That being said, I would never in a million years consider rushing to a different estate planner who could fit me in "tomorrow" just to quickly draft me a poor quality product that would not hold up to challenge. The products and services Kelly and team output are comparable to Stonehenge; they will remain strong forever.

Extremely Disappointed – Serious Errors and Unprofessional Conduct
I hired Catherine Casto for what should have been a simple, uncontested, flat-fee divorce.
My husband and I were on good terms with full agreement on every issue. Instead, Ms.
Casto made repeated, serious mistakes in the divorce documents — including stating we
were selling our home when our written instructions clearly said we wanted to continue co-
owning it, and then inserting a sale date that had already passed.
When I pointed out these errors, instead of correcting them, she told me my divorce was
now “contested” and that I had to pay more money. The only problems in the case were
caused by her own drafting mistakes, not any disagreement between the parties.
I ultimately fired her and completed the entire divorce myself. It was finalized without any
of the issues she claimed existed.
In my experience, her work lacked accuracy, diligence, and professionalism. I cannot
recommend this attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is unfortunate that you were not satisfied with our services. You engaged our firm to represent you in an uncontested flat fee divorce that was not truly uncontested. I am very unhappy with my experience with Adam Levin. While he did represent me in my DUI case, I did not feel that he pursued or achieved the best possible plea outcome. More importantly, his conduct after the plea was completed was extremely unprofessional.

My mother, who paid for his services, contacted him with a few reasonable follow-up questions. Rather than addressing them professionally, he accused her of “harassing” him and told her never to contact him again. This was surprising and upsetting, especially given that she was the client who retained and paid him.

After she filed a complaint with the Better Business Bureau, I was informed that he would no longer assist me with trying to obtain a limited or hardship license to get to and from work — something I reasonably expected help with as part of ongoing representation.

Overall, I felt disrespected, dismissed, and unsupported once the plea deal was completed. Based on both the outcome and the way my family and I were treated, I would not recommend this attorney.

reviews.text: Adam Levin is exactly the right person for this job. I faced multiple charges in Georgia, including a felony charge. I am the true definition of the wrong place at the wrong time when I was driving in Georgia and my license was suspended back home in Missouri without my knowledge. Because I left the state to go back home to Missouri, the charges escalated from just a driving while suspended to a felony bail jumping (out of state) charge. I drove 12 hours to Georgia to get this taken care of, terrified that my fate rested in the hands of the Georgia court system, who refused to work with me from across state lines to get this resolved. Adam sat with me on the bench outside of the courtroom and did his best to calm me down, he also sat with me as we spoke to the judge and explained the situation, again reassuring me that things would be okay and doing his best to keep me calm. After leaving Georgia and returning home to Missouri after court, I received 2 separate texts from Adam that both of my cases had been dismissed. I believe that I am free today because of Adam, and my life could have fallen apart had I not hired the right person for these cases. Know that even in the most complex cases, he will fight for you and do his best to help you. Even from across state lines with very limited face to face interaction, Adam fought to protect my freedom. He will do the same for you.

reviews.text: I came to Mr. Wiltshire needing a defense attorney when an investigator reached out to me. I went with Mo because of his excellent reputation, knowledge, and unparalleled experience in the field. One of the best decisions I’ve ever made as Mo engaged investigators with wisdom and respect, resulting in no charges being filed and my family and I being able to go on with our lives in peace. Not only is Mo the best out there, he also offers his services at an extremely competitive rate. I would 110% employ Mr. Wiltshire if I had it to do over again, as my life has been directly impacted for the better because of Mo. Go with him. You won’t regret it!
Hands down, the BEST defense attorney in Georgia. Very experienced and knows what he is doing. I fully trust Mr. Wiltshire and am so thankful for his help.

When I was locked up, a cop pulled me out of my cell and said “I want to talk to you for a second. I see something in you that these other people don’t see. Let me tell you something. You need a good lawyer. I don’t care if you have to spend the rest of your life paying them off. Get a good lawyer. I don’t care if this is the only thing you listen to, listen to this. You need a good lawyer, understand? You need a good lawyer.”

Mr. Wiltshire is far more than that lawyer. I cannot believe what he has done for me. He is the perfect combination of southern hospitality but doesn’t put up with bullshit - I remember my first time in his office, yelling at him and him not yelling back because he knew what state I was in.

Since then, he has been incredibly compassionate, has seen me as a person and not a case, and has treated me with more grace, forgiveness, and compassion than I have words to describe.

Not to mention the amazing plea deal he got for me - I believe that he saved my life. I believe I would not be here, seeing the Sun and the Trees, without him. I am grateful every day that I am free, and I extend that gratitude to Mr. Wiltshire.

He is extremelywell known and respected by the judicial system. Everyone knows him in every county - Clarke, Barrow, and Oconee. Every time his name is mentioned, the whole room stands up straight. He is very well respected, and for great reason. What he says, talks. His words have meaning to them. He will get you what you deserve, and get you on track to a better life. He genuinely cares about sobriety and is willing to help and is happy to see me grow.

His team is also excellent. Kamell and Britta are both the epitome of professionalism and courtesy.

I do not regret a dollar I spent on Mr. Wiltshire and I would gladly do it time and time again, though I hope to learn from this lesson and never ever find myself in the predicament I was in years ago.

DO NOT SETTLE. If you have a serious criminal case, seriously, do whatever you have to do to get a good attorney. It could very possibly be the difference between decades in a cell versus a couple years probation.

If you have a case in another part of the country where it is not his jurisdiction to represent, he also has excellent contacts and can help you find a good lawyer elsewhere. His network, his team, and him are the dream team.

I have recommended him to everyone I come across. He is the only attorney I will go to or recommend. I stress it to everyone, that he is expensive, but for a reason- you get what you pay for. Don’t look at his prices as a bad thing, be secure and have confidence that he knows what he’s doing because he does - through and through.

I am forever grateful and thankful for Mr. Wiltshire and all that he has done for me. I don’t take it for granted and I think about it more than he knows. I’ve heard “Mo is the way to go” and I repeat that.

With all gratitude, love and light, Robin 🤍

I came to Mo with a DUI charge. It would have been my third. After said situation i did a quick google searched and seen the positive reviews from people speaking highly of Mo. i reached out to Mo on a Sunday morning and before Sunday afternoon he was on the phone with me already getting a game plan together. He gave me a fair price for his help and offered a payment plan and was completely helpful the entire time. He helped organize a plea deal that will change my charge to reckless driving. This will impact my life greatly saving me so much in legal fees and allowing me to keep my license. The actions he been able to do is the kind of work that gets a man a Christmas card for the rest of my life. It’s completely appreciated how helpful and responsive him and his teams were to my many nagging emails. I highly recommend you give him a shout when in need.

Thanks Mo!

This firm is definitely THE place to find counsel. Mr. Wiltshire was a prosecutor long before he switched to defense. He demonstrated that he is very familiar with the sitting judges and prosecutors including particular nuisances. You will only get straight up advice from a foundation of unmatched knowledge and experience. See for yourself!

reviews.ownerResponse:
As always any client or potential client that has any issues with me can reach me directly at my office or by my email and we can discuss their situation in person or on the phone and get things ironed out. Sometimes the facts are stubborn and the the situation does not lend itself to The Rosy Scenario we might wish for because the evidence against someone is clear and compelling. Unfortunately, client confidentiality rules prevent me from publicly responding with details that would establish that everything that could reasonably done to help in this case was done. Sometimes the evidence is simply overwhelming and expectations are not based on reality. I would ask anyone that reads this review to first of all recognize how it stands in such stark contrast to all of the others and also to do a simple Google search and you can read the well over 100 reviews from happy clients that are available on the internet. As always I will put my services and the talent and helpfulness of my staff up against anybody, anywhere, and at anytime. Some people just can't be helped and some of those people simply can't realize that their expectations are unreasonable. We will continue to take excellent care of all of our clients and we'll continue to treat them as we ourselves expect to be treated.
-Mo

Brian Cathey is an amazing and personable attorney for GA malpractice cases, I highly highly recommend him and his team. reviews.text: I had a terrible experience. Please run from this place. I was looking to file for Chapter 13 to stop a garnishment. This qas back in June I paid the fee in full. My payments which i was told from the beginning would be at the most 1100 including my mortage, I had my meeting with Burrow and he never inform me during the neeting what my payment was and so I called Lisa she told me it will be 500 a month. When I received my paperwork it stated 760 bi weekly and my mortage wil be paid seperate. I email Lisa and told her I could not afford this I was worse off with this plan. And i no longer wanted to move forward. This was October18. She called me we discussed and the next thing the trustee sending a letter to my job asking them to take 760 bi weekly from my check and the bad thing I am still to this day getting garnished from one of the creditor thats included in the payment plan. The garnishment never stopped. They still schedule a meeting with the creditors after i told Lisa thats not what i want to do. I refuse to meet and finally she sent me a voluntary dismissal form to fill out. I was not represented well at all. You moving like you on the creditor side and as if they are paying you. Feel free to reach out to me at anytime. I have emails of all the discussions. I should not have a bankrupty on my revord because of your neglect
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We appreciate your honesty and understand that financial matters can be complex and sometimes subject to change. Our commitment is to provide accurate and personalized recommendations based on the information provided to us.
In your case, there were significant discrepancies between the initial information you provided to us and the actual details we uncovered through our independent research and analysis. We want to assure you that our goal is to ensure transparency and fairness in all our dealings.
Our original estimates for your plan payments were based upon your answers to the questions we asked. Unfortunately, the information you provided at a later date, did not match the information you had provided initially. The difference was quite material and significantly changed the amount of your plan payments.
We had already filed an emergency petition to stop the garnishment but you asked to dismiss your case before we were able to stop it. The court automatically set your hearing date as soon as the case was filed. Once You decided you did not want to proceed with the case any further, we prepared the documents for you to dismiss your case.
We understand that unexpected changes in financial circumstances can be challenging, and we apologize that this adjustment altered your plans to deal with this particular financial difficulty.
Thank you for your understanding.

Title: Beyond Grateful – A True Victory with Daniels & Rothman

I want to sincerely thank my attorney, Jeffrey Rothman, and the entire Daniels & Rothman team for helping me overcome the most terrifying experience of my life, facing serious felony charges. After multiple hearings and dealing with false accusations, I was overwhelmed with fear and uncertainty. I have never been in trouble before, with no criminal record at all, so the shock and anxiety were unlike anything I had ever felt.

As a Black man, my greatest hope was simply to receive a fair trial. I prayed day and night, even fasting to strengthen my faith. God led me to the right lawyer. Someone who not only believed in me but also maintained professionalism, integrity, and a clear vision through all the lies. Jeff told me to stay calm, trust him, and trust the process.

His entire team was outstanding, straightforward, honest, and unwavering in their defense. They stood their ground for me at every turn. Behind the scenes, I know there were others whose names I may never know, but to each of you, please accept my deepest thanks.

The charges I faced could have resulted in more than 20 years in prison, yet today I am free. The weight has been lifted, and I am in tears of gratitude. God is so good! My faith was tested, and He delivered a victory.

To Jeffrey Rothman, Kailah, and the whole Daniels & Rothman team: my family and I thank you from the bottom of our hearts. This firm is exceptional and truly highly recommended. Five gold stars, without question.

If you are in need of a lawyer, do not hesitate—call Daniels & Rothman immediately. They will fight for you.

Thank You All Again,

Mr. Hall

I worked with Greg Daniels for over a year in a 2023/24 custody case for my two daughters. As a father in Georgia, it is hard to know what to look for in a lawyer for a case like this - but Greg was amazing. He and I teamed up really well, gave one another great guidance & advice, and we ultimately won FULL custody, and all decision making authorities. While he can sometimes be hard to get on the calendar - when it's go time, Greg & his team are TURNED ON, and they are amazing in the courtroom. Bravo my friend!

Jeffrey Rothman handled two cases for me and was there to help every step of the way from the initial consultation where he explained everything very clearly and did not over promise anything to fighting for me in the courtroom. He delivered beyond my expectations. If you're looking for someone professional, compassionate, and diligent, he's your guy. Plus, he's a cool cat, so you'll always feel like you're in good hands. After my motorcycle accident last year I was left both physically, financially, emotionally and spiritually broken in ways I have never experienced in my life. I laid in the emergency bed just after returning from literal death itself. I called upon God to help me; not to just get through all the tribulations I was facing. Instead to help guide me and show me the way. That’s when I knew I needed someone who understood both the legal and faith situation I was now facing. Only one person I knew who could stand with me as both my shield and sword. That was Parker McFarland. Unfortunately my case was not looking very good. The insurance providers unwilling to help and hundreds of thousands in debt without an income became very difficult to deal with. Parker and his team never let me give up, neither did they. Even after a year of struggling to make ends meet, without hope that I could even pay my regular bills much less the mounting debt. Parker never stopped being that sword and shield. The prayers Parker spoke over the phone every time I called fueled my belief that this was in gods hands. We both prayed together for my body and soul. God was using Parker’s hands to save me in more ways than one. That’s when Parker and his team did the unimaginable. They not only help me get my bills paid, these amazing people gave me back my faith. My case is unique but so is yours. If you need that faith to keep going, you’ll find it with these angels who carry legal pads. Thank you Parker and your team for everything you have done for me. I’ll keep praying because I know you will too.

Sincerely,

Steven D. Bell

A review will not fully express my gratitude for the services provided by Phil Pilgrim at Banks, Stubbs & McFarland LLP or how skilled Phil is, but I will try. In short, if you or someone you know needs an attorney, you will not find a better firm. If you need a criminal defense attorney, I encourage you to contact Phil Pilgrim. Here is my story.

I first met Phil over three years ago when I was waiting for my daughter to be released at the Gwinnett Co. jail. I was devastated because I did not understand how she got to this point. I had only recently found out she was bipolar with psychosis. She had been misdiagnosed for about 10 years and was not receiving the treatment she needed. As Phil was walking past the waiting area, he could see I was distressed. I asked if he was a lawyer and he sat down and spoke with me. I have no doubt that God put him there that day at that time to help me. He listened, gave me his card.

About four months later my daughter was in a horrible auto accident in which the passenger in her car died. She was hit broad side by an 18-wheeler. I do not know how she lived, but she was severely physically broken and needed multiple surgeries. I had retained Phil's card and I called him. He comforted my wife and me. He gave us advice. We retained him to represent our daughter and help us through the nightmare. He had the accident investigated. He kept us up to date. He helped us find a much better psychiatrist. He was honest with me and my daughter. He did not always tell us what we wanted to hear, but he always told us what we needed to hear.

In all, my daughter was arrested four times over an 18-month period before she finally got the help she needed. Phil helped us get through this time and played a large role in convincing our daughter to get the psychiatric help she needed. Phil navigated the case and, with the help of the investigators, put together what probably happened in the accident. He put together a plan with the DA's office that resolved three of the cases and required my daughter to get the treatment she needed. She was monitored for a for a year. Now it seems to be a way of life for her.

Every day brings its own challenges for someone who is bipolar, but thanks to Phil, my wife and I have our daughter back and she is the best she has been in over 10 years.
Phil, thank you for your compassion, your guidance and for getting all of through this very difficult time.

It was excellent working with Phil Pilgrim and his assistant Kelli Moore. The knowledge and experience that Phil brings is priceless!!! The communication was top notch, and their ease of accessibility made the process less stressful.

It was a real pleasant experience working with BBGA. Everyone that had to work with me was real nice. They took the time to explain everything that I needed to be explained if they didn’t know the answer they didn’t stop until they got the correct answer for me. Very kind people, it was a pleasure working with them. Although this case came to an end they informed me that if I still need them I can call. Thank you to Chase Ruffin and his team.

reviews.text: After our car wreck in January, I was overwhelmed with the process of dealing with insurance, medical providers and billing, I decided to hire an attorney to represent my wife and me. I initially called one of those big TV firms, but was immediately turned off by how pushy they were asking for lots of personal info up front, etc. I found BBGA through a google search and contacted them through their user friendly website. Within half an hour, Michael Ruppersburg had reached out to me directly by phone. He was very polite and professional, asking for details but not being invasive. From the first in person meeting, to the settlement closing, he and his staff took great care to keep us informed about our case status, the process, and they fought very hard for us to get the settlement we deserve. Honestly, it was more than I ever expected we would get. BBGA's fees were reasonable and we didn't have to pay anything until the settlement was approved. If you're on the fence about calling an attorney after your personal injury incident, I highly recommend calling BBGA. It took a lot of pressure off an already very stressful time and allowed us to just focus on recovery. Thank you Michael!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words! We are so glad you had such a good experience. Navigating the legal system following a wreck can be daunting, especially if you're still recovering from injuries. On behalf of Michael  Ruppersburg and the rest of the BBGA staff, thank you for allowing us to represent you and your family during such a difficult time. We hope you're well on your way to recovering.

reviews.text: Attorney Michael Ruppersburg and his staff were absolutely amazing! By far the best call I could have made was to them. They treated me with compassion and as a priority. They were very caring and professional. I never had to worry or be concerned about the status of my case because I was always kept well informed; Michael would give me continuous updates via email or he would call me himself.  There were many times that I had questions that I would email him and he would always answer them very promptly. I was involved in a wreck in November 2018 and my case was settled in June 2019 but keep in mind that not all cases can be resolved that quickly but know that they are constantly working hard for you. Do not ever try to take on an insurance company by yourself, Michael is very knowledgeable  and knows how to deal with these companies and their attorney's that will greatly benefit you in the end. If I ever find myself in the same situation again, I will not hesitate to call Michael. I highly recommend Attorney Michael Ruppersburg!

reviews.text:
Michael did an excellent job with resolving a home insurance claim denial. It was supposed to be a simple and straightforward claim for a burst pipe, but the insurance company took months to process it before a full denial. This happened after we had been out of our house for months, and after many hours spent talking to the multiple adjusters and agents who repeatedly assured us that we were in good hands. Nope. Do not believe the ads.

We were told it was a waste of time and money to fight the company -- especially by the local agent (who claims to fight on your side) who said it was an open and shut case for a denial after his 20 years of experience. But Michael took the time to listen to our grievances and gave us precise instructions about how to file a complaint with the state insurance commission. He carefully read our policy and found language that demonstrated where the insurance company was wrong. Michael filed a formal complaint with the company and dealt with the insurance company's lawyers. We were finally able to settle with the company.

We are grateful for Michael's help. We turned to him on a whim, to simply ask for advice when we felt hopeless, frustrated, and angry. We are glad we did. We highly recommend him. He is competent and professional. It's definitely worth your time to talk to him because he will take the time to help you, no matter how small the grievance.

Absolutely phenomenal attorney. Our insurance company's position turned 180 degrees when Michael Ruppersburg got involved. The insurance company, after dragging their feet for nearly two months, had determined that they will not pay anything because our damages did not fall under coverage. After trying many, many times to talk to the adjusters, local insurance contact person, etc. ourselves and getting stonewalled, I called the Ruppersburg office and Michael offered to look over our insurance policy. He found that actually the insurance had miscategorized our case and our damages were in fact covered. He got in contact with the insurance company and soon after, we got the first offer of settlement! We thought of taking this offer since we had become exhausted with the process, but Michael urged us to take fuller account of the expenses we had incurred from the damages and very patiently worked with us to gather necessary documentation. He pushed the insurance again to account for those, and got us an even better second offer. Throughout the whole process, we found Michael to be tenacious, patient, upfront, and accessible, all the things you'd want in an attorney. So glad to work with him, would recommend him to anyone I know.
5 stars! He helped my husband and I with a car accident in Athens! Definitely recommend! We appreciate the help and support so much!

reviews.text: Very professional in meeting; quite expensive especially as I had most of documents previously prepared and need updating.  Quick to take large deposit and not quick in their work.  No communication 5 weeks post the initial meeting and no sense of when the work will be complete.
reviews.ownerResponse: We would like to thank this client for the time she took to leave feedback. According to our records, the time from initial consultation to document signing in this matter was around six weeks, which is a reasonable turnaround for an estate planning/elder law firm serving multiple clients. It’s worth noting that this reviewer’s comments highlight a common misconception about what’s involved when one law firm updates estate planning documents prepared by another. Many people believe a quick review is all that’s necessary. That’s rarely the case. At Kimbrough Law, we take great care to make sure that every legal document we create achieves the intended goals. This level of scrutiny takes time and, judging by the reviews we have received, our clients are grateful for this attention to detail.

reviews.text: Highly recommend Kimbrough. From the start to finish the entire staff was professional, kind, informative and responsive to my calls. My 84 yr old father went for elder care advice for him and my mother with ALZ. He had a good existing POA but it potentially lacked the full financial power he would want his agent to have. A new will was done should he pass before my mother that would care for her with a trust.

reviews.text: The staff was friendly, knowledgeable, timely responsive to our inquiries, patient with our need for more information or clarification, and understanding about our needs. While we are not aware of other legal issues that the firm can address, we would not hesitate to ask them to help us or to refer us to a law firm that is as capable as Kimbrough Law.

reviews.text: Bayli is making navigation through the Georgia Probate process seem not so daunting after losing both of my parents.  Bre and Hunter are responsive, knowledgeable and a great help too.  I would give them my highest recommendation.

We recently engaged Fields Elder Law firm to assist us with preparing a Revocable Living Trust. Bayli Fields and her staff of Hunter and Bre, did an excellent job of laying out the various options (wills vs trusts, revocable vs irrevocable trusts) with pro's and con's on each. Bayli was very responsive in answering all of our questions and incorporating our desires for asset distributions at certain time-gates for the grandkids so their inheritance would be better appreciated, as well as including language to ensure our successor trustee understood our goals and desires. We highly recommend Fields Elder Law if you're seeking a professional local-area law firm for estate planning.
Very thorough and explained everything incredibly well. Definitely recommend for estate needs.

Bayli Fields helped us tie up all the loose ends with our wills and our durable power of attorney for health care choices.
She explained the different options open to us in a clear way that helped us choose what was right for us.
When it came time to sign, Hunter Fontinel walked us through the signing process (patiently!)
And Bre is always a welcoming presence at the front desk!
I am very glad we found The Fields team.

I cannot say enough about the incredible service we’ve received from Bayli at Fields Elder Law.
Bayli and her team has been compassionate, knowledgeable, and attentive to every detail. They took the time to explain complex legal matters in a way that was easy to understand, and they always made us feel comfortable and supported throughout the process.
What truly sets them apart is their deep understanding of elder law and their commitment to providing personalized solutions. Whether it was navigating estate planning, helping with long-term care considerations, or ensuring that all documents were in order, they were there every step of the way, providing peace of mind to our family.
Bayli excels in professionalism and also truly cares about her clients.  I would highly recommend them to anyone seeking elder law services—they truly go above and beyond.

Bayli Fields is outstanding!  She and her team are knowledgeable, professional, patient, and follow up in a timely manner. She was up to date on all new law changes that may have affected us.   A highly professional office and I recommend highly.

When my parents needed their estate planning documents updated, we turned to Fields Elder Law & Estate Planning.  Bayli and her team are absolutely the BEST! We appreciated Bayli's honest recommendation that only half of my parents estate planning documents actually needed updating.  Bayli was respectful to my parents and me- a great listener, patient with our questions and never condescending with her answers.   We'd give her 10 stars if we could!

Most of our estate planning is already set up, but we came to Fields Elder Law to update our Healthcare POA and Advance Directives. They immediately saw the corrections needed and, since we had time to wait, generated and helped us sign the new forms that day. They also noted one more action we might want to take with our estate planning which we are now pursuing. Thank you.

How grateful I am to have been referred to Bayli for assistance with understanding the VA benefits that my elderly father (and mother) deserved. Successfully navigating the complicated landscape of the VA is difficult. Bayli quickly demonstrated expertise and confidence and got results ! Those results were significant and impactful for all our family. All good offices have staff that help make them good........Bre makes this office great.
Thanks Bre for your leadership!

I can't say enough about the exceptional service we received from Bayli and Bre at Fields Elder Law and Estate Planning! At 50 and 45, my spouse and I were navigating the realm of estate planning, not exactly fitting the "elder law" category, but boy, did they deliver!

Bayli and Bre went above and beyond to ensure that all our affairs were in perfect order. Their expertise in estate planning allowed us to clearly articulate our wishes and get all the necessary documents squared away. It's like having a personalized roadmap for the future.

But here's the kicker – these folks redefine patience. Seriously, they might be the most patient legal team known to humankind.

If you're in the market for professionals who not only know their stuff but also treat you like family, Fields Elder Law and Estate Planning is the way to go. Highly recommended for anyone who wants to ensure their wishes are not just heard but respected. Kudos to Bayli, Bre, and the entire team!

Bre and Bayli are FABULOUS!! This firm helped me navigate some difficult things for the sake of my mother who has Alzheimer's. They were so thorough, organized, and caring. It was an extra blessing how kind they were to my Mom when she came with me to the appointment. That kind of care along with the expertise and organization goes a long way. You can't go wrong with Fields Elder!!

reviews.text: I first want to say that Josh Branch and his team are amazing. My Story: I was crossing a street with the right of way when a motorist turning right on red was so concentrated on the traffic he didn’t see me crossing and hit me straight on. I was taken to the hospital with a head and back injury. I’m not a person who immediately wants to call a personal injury attorney, but after talking to some friends in the insurance business who told me it would be a nightmare for me to navigate the process without one, I hired Joshua Branch. My medical bills exceeded $74,000 and the driver only had $25,000 of liability insurance. To make up the difference Josh and his team were able to tap into the uninsured motor vehicle insurance I had on two of my vehicles. It several months of many questions, forms, affidavits, and other hoops Josh and his team got me a fair settlement. During those several months Josh’s team kept me posted of their progress and I was able to concentrate on rehab and getting better. Josh and his team made everything easy for me and they were wonderful to work with - I highly recommend The Law Offices of Joshua W. Branch Injury and Accident.Lawyers.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Barker, let me begin by saying it was an absolute honor to represent you, and I am very pleased that you are satisfied with the result.  Everyone at this firm works tirelessly to ensure that our clients receive just, true and fair results on their cases.  Whether we receive those through settlements or verdicts that are rendered by a jury, we are happy to do whatever it takes to ensure that our clients receive the justice they deserve.  We are always here for you if you need us.  All the best, Josh Branch

reviews.text: Thank you Mr. Jason Slider. Mr. Slider fought my case for 4 long years and never stopped fighting even after the multiple court dates, bad pleas from the DA Mr Slider never stopped. Took the case to trail and was found not guilty.

Anytime someone is faced with a situation where they need expert guidance, it is off-putting to realize you are placing a part of your future in another's hands. I am aware of my competencies (accounting & finance) and incompetencies (dealing with county  legal system). Mr. Slider handled my issue very well. He and his staff responded promptly to phone calls. He was present for all encounters with the court system with advice on how to respond. I am satisfied with the outcome. So why, you may ask, didn't I give five stars; I almost did but thinking back of my apprehension throughout the months of our involvement I feel I could have been kept in the loop a little more. In Mr. Slider's defence, he may not have had any feedback any earlier than he did. Keep in mind that I was a highly anxious client so may be more critical on this point than others. At any rate, I would highly recommend Mr. Slider to anyone facing similar circumstances.
Jason did an excellent job and he is a good person to work with. He communited well with me and kept me informed on all aspects of my case. I would use Jason again, anytime.

reviews.text: Highly recommend Farmhouse Law!  I am always impressed with their level of communication and their streamlined process from start to finish. They are always available to answer any questions and keep all parties informed throughout the entire closing process. Their thorough explanations of everything, from the legal jargon to the steps involved in the closing process, really help my clients understand what is happening every step of the way. They truly care about customer satisfaction and go above and beyond to ensure that experiences are positive.  The paralegals and office staff are extremely helpful and always prompt!  They are well-informed on all residential matters, mobile homes, commercial transactions and business sales - helpful across the board for any questions that come up for me! Their office is also conveniently located in downtown Watkinsville in a beautiful old historic ‘farmhouse’ with large conference rooms and plenty of parking.

He made a referral for trust services and assisted us with the necessary framework for a gift of art to the Georgia Museum of Art through the University of Georgia Foundation after my death. We discussed the disposal of physical property and included instructions within the documents for appropriate distribution. Throughout this process his staff were efficient and provided timely followup. We are very pleased and will use this firm for other matters as they might occur.

I have known Jason for many years and have had the opportunity to watch his professional growth firsthand — first as a police officer and coworker, then as an investigator with the District Attorney’s Office while attending law school, and ultimately into his role as a practicing attorney. Because of that background, I already had a great deal of trust in him when we first needed legal help.

During the pandemic, Jason assisted us with a very complicated and high-level estate matter involving five parcels of land and the reopening of several estates to correct deed issues in DeKalb County. Jason and his legal assistant, Alicia, were nothing short of amazing. While the process took time due to the pandemic and delays within DeKalb County, they handled everything professionally and thoroughly, and the end result was very positive.

More recently, my wife was involved in a horrific car accident that turned our lives upside down. What followed was not just a legal battle, but a long, exhausting, and emotional journey filled with uncertainty, stress, and concern for her health and future. From day one, Jason and Alicia treated our situation with genuine compassion and care. They were consistently responsive, patient, and reassuring during a time when we truly needed it most.

Every time I called their office, Alicia took my call — even when I just needed to vent or talk through concerns. Jason never made us feel like just another case; he made us feel like our family truly mattered. The outcome of my wife’s case exceeded our expectations, but more importantly, they helped carry us through one of the most difficult periods of our lives.

While Jason and Alicia were compensated for their work, I honestly don’t know how we could ever repay them for the dedication, empathy, and personal attention they showed our family. We are deeply grateful for everything they did, and I would recommend Jason and his team without hesitation to anyone in need of legal representation.

He insured me my charges for email harassment would be dropped and he refused to fight for me.   The email was one email begging my husband to give our marriage a chance.   I had a no contact bond and I never responded to my ex husband even when he has tried to contact me while I had a no contact bond.   During the time I was waiting to go to court my now ex husband tried contacting me over 30 times directly or through MY children and my parents, I wasn't allowed to go see my grandchildren play sports but yrt he was allowed to come to the hospital while MY daughter was giving birth and asked to leave by 3 different people to leave and even told by daughter before hand not to come and I was told he could harrass me all he wanted because I was the one in trouble for sending one email that was not threatening in any kind of way.    I paid Jason $2500, I've never been in trouble with the law only a minor speeding ticket.   He refused to show the harassment i have been having to deal with or the physical abuse I put up with for 16 years to Solicitor Gabe Bradford and was told Gabe didn't give a damn about what i was being put through i shouldnt have sent my husband an email begging for his love.   Do not waste your money get a public defender Solictor Gabe Bradford nor Jason care about the real victims even when you hand them black and white proof.   I am now on 6 months probation with thousands in fines while my ex husband can continue to harass me and my family and every law enforcement officer and judicial person tells me they will not do anything to help me.   Let's not mention I'm disabled with Multiple Sclerosis so I gave Jason my last money to live off of.   Go elsewhere for representation don't waste your money. And no after I was arrested for "harassment" I never once responded to my ex husband and sent it straight to my Attorney Jason Black so no I never broke my bond conditions.   Gabe wrote an offer on paper and Jason told me to sign it because he basically didn't want to deal with my dumbass case even though he agreed id get my attorneys fees back and  the case would be dropped because my ex non stopped harassed me over 30 times since September.   It's sad that the judicial system cares more about the perpetrators than the victims.   This is why us abused don't report it because it's more trouble for the true victims while the abusers walk away free.

Was treated very unprofessionally by the associate Drake at this firm. Did not respond to my emails after initially offering to represent me for $600. Followed up with him a week later after not receiving reply emails and he was short, said it was 10:00 a.m. on a Monday and acted as if I was bothering him (this was a week after he told me he would look at my email and follow up). I then called the firm to leave a voicemail for Mike Weinstein, whom has actually represented me in the past, to leave a voicemail to find out if I could be represented or not. Drake call me back immediately and said that the receptionist claimed I called with "an attitude" asking for Mike. Very bizarre interactions and poor treatment from this firm
All I will say is never use this law firm! Find someone else!

They get a one because I could go no lower. Beth Johnston, who works at Weinstein and Black in Jefferson GA, took everything we had while promising to take our case to trial. The first time she wanted to settle. We told her no, but she pushed it through anyway. Following that, when court was scheduled once again, she insisted on mediation. She had demanded another several thousand dollars in advance above our initial bill which was already several thousand paid in advance. Once it was paid in full, she went to mediation and informed us that we needed to take the agreement or give her $10,000 more in order to take it to trial. So here we are, worse off than we were more than a year ago, out over $10,000, and we got nothing we asked for while he got everything. AND our entire retirement savings is gone. (I’m 67). She wouldn’t respond to either calls or texts, and was constantly talking about needing us to give her more money. Is this who you want to represent you? Filing with the Ga Bar Association.

Mr. Adams agreed to work with me in pursuing SSI benefits and I was informed that I would be receiving a packet in the mail to fill out and to collect my records.

This is where everything fell apart. I never received said packet, nor have I ever received any more contact from Mr. Adams. I attempted to reach out myself, and I only got a message from another person saying he would "get back to me soon" and to reply with any questions I may have. This was on October 6th, 2022. I have not received a single response back from Andrew, nor from the customer support email. It feels like I have been snubbed out or brushed aside, and that's not the kind of person or business I want to be representing me. It is unprofessional.

It's a shame too, because I was actually looking forward to working with this firm, as Andrew seemed very pleasant.
